title: Homogenization of rod-like metamaterials as a special Cosserat rod
abstract: Rod-like metamaterials are the structures that are obtained by periodically assembling its microstructural unit (network of rods) in just one direction. In this work, we present a scheme for obtaining the nonlinear constitutive response of such structures when homogenized macroscopically as a continuum rod. To capture accurately arbitrary and large deformation, the geometrically exact special Cosserat rod theory is used for modeling the rod at both micro and macro scales. By assuming the metamaterial structure to be strained uniformly (at macroscale) along its arc length, the full structure problem is reduced to just that of its microstructural unit but subjected to helically periodic boundary condition. The microscale problem, consisting of a network of rods and formulated in a variational setting, is solved in the presence of rod joint constraints and helically periodic boundary conditions. The expressions for the macroscale/homogenized rod's stress resultants (internal contact force and moment) and stiffnesses are then obtained. Finally, several numerical examples having different microstructural units/RVEs are presented to demonstrate our method. We start with simpler square and cross RVEs to validate our results with the existing literature. We then take up more complex RVEs such as square RVEs having helical constituent rods which have application as artificial muscle material and eventually we work on the homogenization of auxetic tubular metamaterials. We show how various design parameters of these RVEs can be tuned to obtain the desired macroscopic response.
summary:
棒状超材料是通过仅沿一个方向周期性组装其微观结构单元（棒网络）而获得的结构。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方案，用于在宏观均匀化为连续体棒时获得此类结构的非线性本构响应。为了准确捕捉任意大变形，使用几何精确的特殊 Cosserat 杆理论在微观和宏观尺度上对杆进行建模。通过假设超材料结构沿其弧长均匀地（在宏观尺度）应变，完整的结构问题被简化为仅其微观结构单元的问题，但受到螺旋周期性边界条件的影响。由杆网络组成并在变分设置中制定的微尺度问题在存在杆接头约束和螺旋周期性边界条件的情况下得到解决。然后获得宏观/均匀杆的应力合力（内部接触力和力矩）和刚度的表达式。最后，提出了几个具有不同微观结构单元/RVE 的数值示例来演示我们的方法。

我们从更简单的方形和十字 RVE 开始，用现有文献验证我们的结果。然后我们采用更复杂的 RVE，例如具有螺旋组成杆的方形 RVE，其可用作人造肌肉材料，最终我们致力于拉胀管状超材料的均质化。我们展示了如何调整这些 RVE 的各种设计参数以获得所需的宏观响应。

title: Quantifying the effects of particle clustering in random thermoelastic composites -- numerical and mean-field analyses
abstract: The effect of space distribution of randomly-placed particles in a representative composite volume on the thermoelastic effective properties and local stress and strain distribution is analyzed. Quantitative assessment is performed using both the full-field finite element analyses and the mean-field interaction model, known also as a ''cluster'' model. The latter model is developed in the multi-family setting enabling one to study the mean stress and strain separately for each inclusion of the representative unit cell. The particles are assumed to be spherical and of equal size, while considered examples differ by the volume fraction of inclusions and mean nearest-neighbour distances.
summary: 分析了代表性复合材料体积中随机放置颗粒的空间分布对热弹性有效性能以及局部应力和应变分布的影响。使用全场有限元分析和平均场相互作用模型（也称为“集群”模型）进行定量评估。后一种模型是在多族环境中开发的，使人们能够分别研究代表性晶胞的每个包含物的平均应力和应变。假设颗粒是球形且大小相等，而所考虑的示例因夹杂物的体积分数和平均最近邻距离而有所不同。

title: Context-Gated Associative Retrieval: From Theory to Transformers
abstract: Hopfield networks and their generalizations have established deep connections among biological associative memories, statistical physics, and transformers. Yet most models treat retrieval as a fixed query-to-memory mapping, ignoring the role of external context in recall. In this work, we propose a two-stage associative memory architecture, wherein a context-gate subcircuit reshapes the retrieval energy landscape before and during recall. We show theoretically that context gating increases inter-memory separation while inducing sparsity, translating into exponential improvements in retrieval. Crucially, we prove that the system admits a unique self-consistent fixed point, revealing that the resulting retrieval state is driven by both a direct contextual bias and a second-order retrieval-gate feedback loop. We then bridge this theory to transformers; specifically, we evaluate a first-order approximation on Llama-3, confirming that in-context learning acts as context-gated retrieval. Native dynamics mirror our theory: context localizes a memory subspace, enabling the zero-shot query to cleanly discriminate. Ultimately, this framework provides a mechanistic link between associative memory theory and LLM phenomenology.
summary:
霍普菲尔德网络及其推广在生物联想记忆、统计物理学和变压器之间建立了深厚的联系。然而，大多数模型将检索视为固定的查询到记忆的映射，忽略了外部上下文在回忆中的作用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种两级联想记忆架构，其中上下文门子电路在回忆之前和期间重塑了检索能量景观。我们从理论上证明，上下文门控增加了内存间的分离，同时引起稀疏性，从而转化为检索的指数级改进。至关重要的是，我们证明系统承认一个独特的自洽固定点，揭示了最终的检索状态是由直接上下文偏差和二阶检索门反馈循环驱动的。然后我们将这一理论与变压器联系起来；具体来说，我们评估了 Llama-3 的一阶近似，确认上下文学习充当上下文门控检索。本机动态反映了我们的理论：上下文本地化内存子空间，使零样本查询能够清晰地区分。

最终，这个框架提供了联想记忆理论和法学硕士现象学之间的机械联系。

title: Inverse Design of Metainterfaces for Static Friction Control: Beyond the Hertzian Limit
abstract: Programming the static friction of mechanical interfaces is critical for soft robotics, haptics, and precision gripping. Static friction is governed by the real contact area, and standard rough surfaces exhibit a linear area-load scaling inherent to classical Archard and Greenwood-Williamson models, severely restricting their functional range. Here, we propose a framework for the inverse design of tribological metainterfaces engineered for programmable contact behaviors. By utilizing general axisymmetric asperities, we unlock nonlinear macroscopic responses unattainable by standard Hertzian contacts. To solve the inverse problem, we embed a fully differentiable contact mechanics engine within a neural network and a quadratic optimizer. We leverage regularized physical gradients to automatically discover non-standard topographies that reproduce complex target friction laws, with only a few asperities in unit cells. The predicted designs are strictly validated against high-fidelity Boundary Element Method (BEM) simulations. This framework bridges data-driven optimization and rigorous physics, offering a scale-invariant pathway for discovering functional tribological surfaces.
summary: 对机械接口的静摩擦进行编程对于软机器人、触觉和精确抓取至关重要。静摩擦由实际接触面积控制，标准粗糙表面表现出经典 Archard 和 Greenwood-Williamson 模型固有的线性面积载荷缩放，严重限制了它们的功能范围。在这里，我们提出了一个针对可编程接触行为的摩擦学元接口逆向设计框架。通过利用一般轴对称粗糙体，我们解锁了标准赫兹接触无法实现的非线性宏观响应。为了解决逆问题，我们在神经网络和二次优化器中嵌入了完全可微的接触力学引擎。我们利用正则化的物理梯度来自动发现非标准地形，这些地形可以重现复杂的目标摩擦定律，并且单位单元中只有一些粗糙度。预测的设计经过高保真边界元法 (BEM) 模拟的严格验证。该框架将数据驱动的优化和严格的物理联系起来，为发现功能摩擦学表面提供了一条尺度不变的途径。

title: Field Theory of Data: Anomaly Detection via the Functional Renormalization Group. The 2D Ising Model as a Benchmark
abstract: We establish a correspondence between anomaly detection in high-noise regimes and the renormalization group flow of non-equilibrium field theories. We provide a physical grounding for this framework by proving that the detection of phase transitions in interacting non-equilibrium systems maps to the study of an effective equilibrium field theory near its Gaussian fixed point, which we identify with the universal Marchenko-Pastur distribution. Applying the Functional Renormalization Group to the two-dimensional Model A, we demonstrate that the noise-to-signal ratio acts as a physical temperature, where the signal emerges as ordered domains within a thermalized background of fluctuations. Using the exact Onsager solution as a benchmark, we show that this approach identifies critical thresholds with an error below 4%, significantly outperforming standard information-theoretic metrics such as the Kullback-Leibler divergence. Our results provide a universal strategy for resolving structures in complex datasets near criticality, bridging the gap between statistical mechanics and statistical inference.
summary: 我们建立了高噪声区域中的异常检测与非平衡场论的重正化群流之间的对应关系。我们通过证明相互作用的非平衡系统中相变的检测映射到高斯不动点附近的有效平衡场理论的研究，为该框架提供了物理基础，我们将其与普遍的马尔琴科-巴斯图尔分布等同起来。将函数重正化群应用于二维模型 A，我们证明了噪声信号比充当物理温度，其中信号在波动的热化背景中以有序域的形式出现。使用精确的 Onsager 解决方案作为基准，我们表明该方法识别关键阈值的误差低于 4%，显着优于标准信息论指标，例如 Kullback-Leibler 散度。我们的结果提供了一种通用策略，用于解决接近临界点的复杂数据集中的结构，弥合了统计力学和统计推理之间的差距。

title: Synergistic doping of the grain interior and grain boundary alters deformation mechanisms and enables extreme strength in nanocrystalline Ni-Cr-Y alloys
abstract: Solid solution addition and grain boundary segregation have been independently shown to enhance the strength of nanocrystalline alloys. In the present study, the synergy between these two effects is investigated in nanocrystalline Ni-Cr-Y sputtered films through systematic variation of alloying element contents with grain size kept constant. Cr is introduced into a solid solution and serves to strengthen the lattice, while Y segregates to the grain boundaries to stabilize these features. Nanoindentation is used to probe hardness, with unexpected trends and very high values observed. Cr additions led to nanocrystalline solid solution strengthening, yet saturation was observed at higher concentrations due to the emergence of grain boundary dominated processes, as evidenced by pile-up morphologies containing slip steps and grain rotation. Y segregated to the grain boundaries, enhancing boundary-mediated strengthening by pinning the dislocations and suppressing dislocation emission, grain boundary sliding, and grain rotation processes. With increasing Y concentration, the nanocrystalline solid solution strengthening effect induced by Cr addition becomes weaker. This phenomenon can be attributed to a reduced dislocation bowing distance caused by dopant pinning. Most notably, the strongest ternary Ni-Cr-Y alloy exhibited a hardness of 11.0 GPa, among the highest hardness values reported for single-phase Ni-based alloys. These findings highlight how tuning grain and grain boundary chemistry offers a viable strategy to control dislocation mechanics and improve the strength of nanocrystalline metals.
summary:
固溶体添加和晶界偏析已被独立证明可以提高纳米晶合金的强度。在本研究中，通过在晶粒尺寸保持恒定的情况下系统地改变合金元素含量，研究了纳米晶 Ni-Cr-Y 溅射薄膜中这两种效应之间的协同作用。 Cr 被引入固溶体并用于强化晶格，而 Y 偏析到晶界以稳定这些特征。纳米压痕用于探测硬度，观察到意想不到的趋势和非常高的值。 Cr的添加导致纳米晶固溶体强化，但由于晶界主导过程的出现，在较高浓度下观察到饱和，如包含滑移台阶和晶粒旋转的堆积形态所证明。 Y偏析到晶界，通过钉扎位错并抑制位错发射、晶界滑动和晶粒旋转过程来增强边界介导的强化。随着Y浓度的增加，Cr添加引起的纳米晶固溶强化效应变弱。

这种现象可归因于掺杂剂钉扎导致的位错弯曲距离减小。最值得注意的是，最强的三元 Ni-Cr-Y 合金的硬度为 11.0 GPa，是单相镍基合金报道的最高硬度值之一。这些发现强调了调整晶粒和晶界化学如何提供控制位错力学和提高纳米晶金属强度的可行策略。

title: Symmetry Guided Band-Gap Opening via Periodic Topological Defects in Graphene
abstract: Graphene lacks an intrinsic band-gap, which limits its use in electronic applications. Here we demonstrate that periodic arrays of topological defects can open and control a band-gap in a predictable manner governed by defect spacing and lattice symmetry. Using first-principles density functional theory calculations supported by tight-binding models, we investigate graphene superlattices containing Stone-Wales and flower-like defects over a range of $N \times N$ periodicities, where $N$ determines the defect separation. We show that band-gap opening occurs only when translation symmetry is reduced in a specific way: for supercells with $N$ a multiple of three, Brillouin-zone folding brings the Dirac cones at $K$ and $K'$ to the same momentum in the reduced Brillouin zone. In particular, flower-like defect superlattices produce larger and tunable band-gaps, whose magnitude decreases systematically with increasing defect separation and approaches zero in the dilute-defect limit. These results establish a predictive framework for band-gap engineering in defect-patterned graphene and clarify the microscopic mechanism underlying gap formation in periodically reconstructed lattices.
summary: 石墨烯缺乏固有的带隙，这限制了其在电子应用中的使用。在这里，我们证明拓扑缺陷的周期性阵列可以以由缺陷间距和晶格对称性控制的可预测方式打开和控制带隙。利用紧束缚模型支持的第一性原理密度泛函理论计算，我们研究了包含石威尔士和花状缺陷的石墨烯超晶格，其周期范围为$N \times N$，其中$N$决定了缺陷分离。我们表明，只有当平移对称性以特定方式减少时，才会出现带隙打开：对于 $N$ 为三倍数的超晶胞，布里渊区折叠使 $K$ 和 $K'$ 处的狄拉克锥体在减少的布里渊区中具有相同的动量。特别是，花状缺陷超晶格产生更大且可调的带隙，其大小随着缺陷分离的增加而系统地减小，并在稀缺陷极限下接近于零。这些结果为缺陷图案石墨烯中的带隙工程建立了预测框架，并阐明了周期性重建晶格中间隙形成的微观机制。

title: Unbiased large-$N$ approach to competing vestigial orders of density-wave and superconducting instabilities
abstract: When a primary order breaks multiple symmetries, partially ordered phases that only break a subset of those symmetries, known as vestigial phases, may onset at a higher temperature. This concept has been applied to a wide range of systems, including iron pnictides, cuprates, van der Waals antiferromagnets, doped topological insulators, and twisted bilayer graphene. In general, a multi-component primary order parameter (OP) supports multiple vestigial channels, each described by a quadratic (or higher-order) composite OP. However, the standard large-$N$ approach to the Ginzburg-Landau action of the primary OP has an intrinsic ambiguity in how one decouples the composite OPs, leading to situations in which one can seemingly enhance or eliminate altogether any vestigial instability. Here, we show that this ambiguity is a direct consequence of redundancy relations, such as Fierz identities, that relate different composite OPs, reflecting the fact that different vestigial channels interfere with each other and thus cannot be treated separately. To resolve this ambiguity, we propose an unbiased large-$N$ approach that respects both the redundancy relations and the underlying symmetry-group structure, and that gives unique values for the effective interactions of all vestigial channels. Our analysis reveals the generic existence of regions in the parameter space of quartic Landau coefficients where no vestigial order is stable, in contrast to the standard large-$N$ approach, but in agreement with weak-coupling and variational approaches. We illustrate our results by analyzing the vestigial orders of charge-density waves, spin-density waves, and multi-component superconductors in tetragonal, hexagonal, and cubic systems, respectively, revealing the presence of exotic vestigial phases describing spin-quadrupolar, charge-$4e$ superconducting, and altermagnetic orders.
summary:
当主序破坏多个对称性时，仅破坏这些对称性的子集的部分有序相（称为残留相）可能会在更高的温度下开始。这一概念已应用于广泛的系统，包括铁磷化物、铜酸盐、范德华反铁磁体、掺杂拓扑绝缘体和扭曲双层石墨烯。一般来说，多分量主阶参数 (OP) 支持多个残留通道，每个通道由二次（或更高阶）复合 OP 描述。然而，主要 OP 的 Ginzburg-Landau 作用的标准大 $N$ 方法在如何解耦复合 OP 方面具有内在的模糊性，导致出现似乎可以增强或完全消除任何残余不稳定性的情况。在这里，我们表明这种模糊性是冗余关系的直接结果，例如 Fierz 恒等式，它涉及不同的复合 OP，反映了不同残留通道相互干扰的事实，因此不能单独处理。

为了解决这种歧义，我们提出了一种无偏的大$N$方法，该方法尊重冗余关系和潜在的对称群结构，并为所有残留通道的有效相互作用提供独特的值。我们的分析揭示了四次朗道系数参数空间中普遍存在的区域，其中没有残留阶是稳定的，这与标准的大$N$方法相反，但与弱耦合和变分方法一致。我们通过分别分析四方、六方和立方系统中的电荷密度波、自旋密度波和多组分超导体的残余阶来说明我们的结果，揭示了描述自旋四极、电荷$4e$超导和交变磁阶的奇异残余相的存在。

title: Random-h Fractional-Dimensional Lattices Reveal Endpoint-Compressed Percolation Activation between Two and Three Dimensions
abstract: Non-integer dimensionality is central to fractal and complex systems, yet it is rarely represented as an explicit lattice on which classical statistical-mechanical models can be directly simulated. Here we introduce random-h fractional dimension (RhFD), a constructive lattice framework in which fractional-dimensional environments are generated by stochastic activation of local connectivity, h. In the 2D-to-3D interval, RhFD lattices are formed by recursively growing out-of-plane sites from a square base with probability \r{ho}h. Using quenched site-percolation simulations, we show that the construction recovers the integer-dimensional endpoints and yields a robust crossover in which the percolation threshold decreases from the 2D regime toward the 3D regime. The crossover is not a uniform interpolation: high-resolution scans reveal endpoint-compressed activation, with -dpc/d\r{ho}h increasing toward \r{ho}h = 1. Mass dimension increases with \r{ho}h, whereas the coordination descriptor first decreases as sparse protrusions form and then rises sharply when a dense 3D backbone emerges. RhFD provides an explicit lattice substrate for fractional-dimensional statistical mechanics and shows that geometric mass, local coordination, and critical connectivity can decouple during dimensional crossover.
summary:
非整数维是分形和复杂系统的核心，但它很少被表示为可以直接模拟经典统计力学模型的显式晶格。在这里，我们引入随机 h 分数维 (RhFD)，这是一种构造性晶格框架，其中分数维环境是通过局部连通性 h 的随机激活生成的。在 2D 到 3D 区间中，RhFD 晶格是通过从方形基底以概率 \r{ho}h 递归生长面外位点形成的。使用淬灭位点渗流模拟，我们表明该结构恢复了整数维端点并产生了稳健的交叉，其中渗流阈值从 2D 区域向 3D 区域降低。交叉不是均匀插值：高分辨率扫描揭示端点压缩激活，-dpc/d\r{ho}h 向 \r{ho}h = 1 增加。质量维度随着 \r{ho}h 增加，而协调描述符首先随着稀疏突起的形成而减少，然后在密集的 3D 主干出现时急剧上升。

RhFD 为分数维统计力学提供了显式的晶格基底，并表明几何质量、局部配位和关键连通性可以在维度交叉过程中解耦。

title: Existent condition of partially wet state in capillary tubes
abstract: We develop a theory that predicts the equilibrium states of a fluid contained in a capillary which has corners. Each section of the tube can take three states: completely wet state where the tube section is completely occupied by the fluid, partially wet state where only the corners are occupied by the fluid known as corner film or finger, and completely dry state. We calculate the phase diagram of these states for a square tube with rounded corners. It is shown that the partially wet state can exist only in a certain region in the parameter space spanned by the equilibrium contact angle and the corner curvature.
summary: 我们发展了一种理论，可以预测有角的毛细管中所含流体的平衡状态。管的每个部分可以采取三种状态：完全湿润状态，其中管部分完全被流体占据；部分湿润状态，其中仅拐角被称为角膜或指状的流体占据；以及完全干燥状态。我们计算圆角方管的这些状态的相图。结果表明，部分湿润状态只能存在于由平衡接触角和拐角曲率跨越的参数空间中的某个区域。

title: Defect screening and load transfer in minimal hard-soft double networks
abstract: Double network (DN) materials exhibit anomalous strength and toughness that far exceed the sum of their constituents. While widely exploited, the fundamental physical mechanisms underlying this synergy remain elusive. Here, we show that a minimal three-dimensional model of two coupled, disordered linear-elastic networks is sufficient to capture the essential physics of DN nonlinear mechanics. The model reproduces the full suite of unique mechanical behaviors, including yielding, necking, strain hardening, and the brittle-to-ductile transition. Mechanical contrast between the hard and soft networks drives inter-network load transfer, which screens defects and suppresses stress concentrations in the hard network. By defining a stress-concentration factor, K_sc, we find that the hard-network failure strain scales universally as 1/K_sc, directly bridging microscopic defect screening to macroscopic yielding. We further show that complete defect screening triggers the shift from localized necking to delocalized damage. Furthermore, the stable necking plateau is identified as an energetic selection governed by the balance between potential energy release and irreversible dissipation. These findings reveal that a simple linear-elastic framework can account for the rich nonlinear landscape of DN materials, providing a general principle for designing next-generation tough solids.
summary:
双网络（DN）材料表现出异常的强度和韧性，远远超过其成分的总和。尽管被广泛利用，但这种协同作用背后的基本物理机制仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们证明两个耦合的无序线弹性网络的最小三维模型足以捕获 DN 非线性力学的基本物理原理。该模型再现了全套独特的机械行为，包括屈服、颈缩、应变硬化和脆性到延性的转变。硬网络和软网络之间的机械对比驱动网络间负载转移，从而屏蔽硬网络中的缺陷并抑制应力集中。通过定义应力集中因子 K_sc，我们发现硬网络失效应变普遍缩放为 1/K_sc，直接将微观缺陷筛选与宏观屈服联系起来。我们进一步表明，完整的缺陷筛查会触发从局部颈缩到非局部损伤的转变。此外，稳定的颈缩平台被认为是由势能释放和不可逆耗散之间的平衡控制的能量选择。

这些发现表明，简单的线弹性框架可以解释 DN 材料丰富的非线性景观，为设计下一代坚韧固体提供一般原则。

title: Euler Topology in Superconducting Honeycomb Lattices
abstract: Electronic bands in systems with space-time inversion (IST) symmetry can host nontrivial Euler topology. Here, we investigate the band topology of IST-symmetric superconducting honeycomb lattices and demonstrate that s-wave spin-singlet (SWSS) and f-wave spin-triplet (FWST) superconducting pairings give rise to valley-Euler and Euler superconductors, respectively. We find that Euler topology in both pairing states gives rise to mirror-symmetry-protected helical domain-wall modes. Furthermore, we show that Euler topology in the FWST state induces non-Abelian braiding of Dirac nodes in momentum space when anisotropic hopping is introduced. Our work establishes superconducting electronic instabilities as a natural route to realizing nontrivial Euler band topology in Dirac materials.
summary: 具有时空反演（IST）对称性的系统中的电子能带可以承载非平凡的欧拉拓扑。在这里，我们研究了 IST 对称超导蜂窝晶格的能带拓扑，并证明 s 波自旋单重态 (SWSS) 和 f 波自旋三重态 (FWST) 超导配对分别产生谷欧拉和欧拉超导体。我们发现两种配对状态下的欧拉拓扑都会产生镜像对称保护的螺旋畴壁模式。此外，我们还表明，当引入各向异性跳跃时，FWST 状态下的欧拉拓扑会导致动量空间中狄拉克节点的非阿贝尔编织。我们的工作将超导电子不稳定性建立为在狄拉克材料中实现非平凡欧拉带拓扑的自然途径。

title: Outstanding TC Enhancement in 5d-3d Y2NiIrO6 by Compression
abstract: Understanding and predicting the properties of 5d compounds critically depend on the identification of the superexchange interactions from which their magnetism emerges. The study of pressure effects on double perovskites Y2NiIrO6 (YNIO) provide deep insight toward this goal. At ambient pressure, YNIO is a ferrimagnetic insulator with the Ir4+-5d Jeff = 1/2 Mott-insulating state. Under the physical pressure up to 17 GPa, the compound exhibits concurrent compression on Ni/Ir-O bond lengths and Ni-O-Ir bond angles, leading to increase of the Curie temperature from 192 to 240 K. In contrary, external pressure increases distanced Ir-Ir interaction and in turn induces magnetic frustration in Sr2IrO4/Sr3Ir2O7 due to the extended 5d orbitals. In YNIO, the rock-salt ordered Ni-Ir naturally blocks extended superexchange beyond the nearest neighbor, and in turn suppresses such magnetic frustration. Moreover, the orthogonal Ni eg-Ir t2g pathway in YNIO is robust under lattice distortion, while the superexchange is weakened by bond bending in La2NiMnO6 with a similar half-filed eg-t2g configuration. Our findings establish a framework for elucidating the mechanism of 5d-3d superexchange and guides bond-engineered magnetism in iridate-related systems.
summary:
理解和预测 5d 化合物的性质关键取决于对其磁性产生的超交换相互作用的识别。对双钙钛矿 Y2NiIrO6 (YNIO) 的压力影响的研究为实现这一目标提供了深入的见解。在环境压力下，YNIO 是亚铁磁绝缘体，具有 Ir4+-5d Jeff = 1/2 Mott 绝缘状态。在高达 17 GPa 的物理压力下，该化合物对 Ni/Ir-O 键长和 Ni-O-Ir 键角表现出同时压缩，导致居里温度从 192 K 升高至 240 K。相反，外部压力增加了 Ir-Ir 相互作用的距离，进而由于延长的 5d 轨道而导致 Sr2IrO4/Sr3Ir2O7 中的磁挫败。在 YNIO 中，岩盐有序 Ni-Ir 自然地阻止了最近邻居之外的扩展超交换，进而抑制了这种磁挫败。此外，YNIO中的正交Nieg-Ir t2g路径在晶格畸变下是稳健的，而具有类似半场eg-t2g构型的La2NiMnO6中的键弯曲削弱了超交换。

我们的研究结果建立了一个阐明 5d-3d 超交换机制的框架，并指导虹膜相关系统中的键合工程磁性。

title: Interband Berry connection measurement in the optical honeycomb lattice
abstract: The geometry of Bloch bands affects many physical properties of crystalline solids and other spatially periodic systems. Direct experimental determination of such geometry is an active area of research. In this work, we focus on the fundamental connection between optical excitations and the relative geometry of pairs of Bloch bands, as characterized by the interband Berry connection. We simulate the response of electrons in solids to optical excitation by the response of ultracold fermionic atoms in optical lattices to periodic modulation of the lattice position. The strength of resonant excitation between bands, measured at each quasimomentum and for various lattice-shaking polarizations, directly maps out the interband Berry connection. We apply this method to the optical honeycomb lattice, driving excitations between the ground $n=1$ band and the excited $n'=\{2,3,4\}$ bands. We observe transparency lines of quasimomenta at which the response to excitation of specific polarization is zero. Further, the interband Berry connection between bands 1 and 3 shows irreducible Dirac strings connecting the $K$ and $K'$ points in the Brillouin zone, lines along which the interband Berry connection abruptly changes orientation. Our work establishes optical response as a powerful tool for characterizing geometrical and topological properties of band structure.
summary:
布洛赫能带的几何形状影响晶体固体和其他空间周期系统的许多物理性质。这种几何形状的直接实验测定是一个活跃的研究领域。在这项工作中，我们重点研究光学激发和布洛赫带对的相对几何形状之间的基本联系，以带间贝里连接为特征。我们通过光学晶格中的超冷费米子原子对晶格位置的周期性调制的响应来模拟固体中电子对光学激发的响应。在每个准动量和各种晶格振动极化下测量的能带之间的共振激发强度，可以直接绘制出带间贝里连接。我们将此方法应用于光学蜂窝晶格，驱动基础 $n=1$ 能带和激发 $n'=\{2,3,4\}$ 能带之间的激发。我们观察到准门塔的透明线，其中对特定偏振激发的响应为零。

此外，带 1 和带 3 之间的带间 Berry 连接显示了连接布里渊区中 $K$ 和 $K'$ 点的不可约狄拉克弦，带间 Berry 连接沿着这些线突然改变方向。我们的工作将光学响应确立为表征能带结构的几何和拓扑特性的强大工具。

title: Fast and Accurate Prediction of Lattice Thermal Conductivity via Machine Learning Surrogates
abstract: The appearance of generative models has opened vast chemical spaces in the design of functional materials. Although machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have substantially accelerated phonon calculations, high-fidelity prediction of lattice thermal conductivity \k{appa}lat still requires accurate treatment of anharmonic interactions, which remains a key challenge for existing potentials across novel chemical spaces. To address this challenge, we present a comprehensive benchmark of 15 surrogate models for predicting \k{appa}lat using the Phonix database, which contains 6,966 entries with anharmonic phonon properties derived from first-principles calculations. Firstly, We categorize these surrogate models into three distinct groups: Physical-informed feature descriptors combined with ML models, end-to-end deep neural networks, and pre-trained MLIP-embeddings combined with ML models. By evaluating model performance across random, space-group disjoint (testing generalization to unseen crystal symmetries), and Out-Of-Distribution splits (OOD dataset that testing extrapolation to property regimes beyond the training range) based on \k{appa}lat, we probe both interpolation and exploration capabilities. Our results reveal that MLIP-embedded models excel in interpolation within well-sampled regions, deep neural network models especially ALiEGNN demonstrate superior robustness in OOD regimes critical for discovering novel low-\k{appa}lat. Additionally, we find a systematic degradation in performance when the structural representation is reduced. Although surrogate models exhibit lower accuracy than direct simulations using first-principles calculation, they reduce computational costs by orders of magnitude, enabling efficient high-throughput screening of thermoelectric materials with minimal loss in generative design workflows.
summary:
生成模型的出现为功能材料的设计开辟了广阔的化学空间。尽管机器学习原子间势（MLIP）大大加速了声子计算，但晶格热导率 \k{appa}lat 的高保真预测仍然需要精确处理非谐相互作用，这仍然是新型化学空间中现有势的关键挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个由 15 个代理模型组成的综合基准，用于使用 Phonix 数据库预测 \k{appa}lat，该数据库包含 6,966 个条目，这些条目具有从第一原理计算中得出的非谐波声子属性。首先，我们将这些替代模型分为三个不同的组：与 ML 模型相结合的物理信息特征描述符、端到端深度神经网络以及与 ML 模型相结合的预训练 MLIP 嵌入。

通过基于 \k{appa}lat 评估随机、空间群不相交（测试对看不见的晶体对称性的泛化）和分布外分裂（测试对超出训练范围的属性状态的外推的 OOD 数据集）的模型性能，我们探讨了插值和探索能力。我们的结果表明，MLIP 嵌入模型在采样良好的区域内插值方面表现出色，深度神经网络模型（尤其是 ALiEGNN）在 OOD 机制中表现出卓越的鲁棒性，这对于发现新颖的低 k{appa}lat 至关重要。此外，我们发现当结构表示减少时，性能会系统性下降。尽管替代模型的精度低于使用第一原理计算的直接模拟，但它们将计算成本降低了几个数量级，从而能够对热电材料进行高效的高通量筛选，同时将生成设计工作流程的损失降至最低。

title: The Algebra of Free Fermions: Classifying Spaces, Hamiltonians, and Computation
abstract: Research on topological phases of matter is a core field in modern condensed matter physics. Free fermion systems, such as topological insulators and superconductors, have been studied using the "Tenfold Way" and K-theory. Building on Kitaev's idea of $\Omega$-spectrum and classifying space, as well as Freed-Moore's K-theory, this work demonstrates that free fermionic systems form a genuine $G$-$\Omega$-spectrum and clarifies its connection to several distinct classification schemes appearing in the physical literature. By introducing the $\mathbb{Z}_2$-graded algebra $A_{\mathrm{sym}}^V$, the classification problem for systems with general symmetries, including antilinear symmetries, antisymmetries, projective representations, and point group symmetries, is turned into an extension problem in representation theory. To solve this, a computational method for the $\mathbb{Z}_2$-graded Wedderburn-Artin decomposition of $A_{\mathrm{sym}}^V$ is developed. This decomposition not only yields a classification but also enables the explicit construction of the corresponding Dirac Hamiltonian. Furthermore, a GAP programming package has been developed to automate these calculations.
summary: 物质拓扑相的研究是现代凝聚态物理的核心领域。自由费米子系统，例如拓扑绝缘体和超导体，已经使用“十倍方式”和K理论进行了研究。基于 Kitaev 的 $\Omega$ 谱和分类空间的思想，以及 Freed-Moore 的 K 理论，这项工作证明了自由费米子系统形成了真正的 $G$-$\Omega$ 谱，并阐明了它与物理文献中出现的几种不同分类方案的联系。通过引入$\mathbb{Z}_2$分级代数$A_{\mathrm{sym}}^V$，将具有一般对称性（包括反对称、反对称、射影表示和点群对称）系统的分类问题转化为表示论中的可拓问题。为了解决这个问题，开发了 $A_{\mathrm{sym}}^V$ 的 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 分级 Wedderburn-Artin 分解的计算方法。这种分解不仅产生分类，而且还能够显式构造相应的狄拉克哈密顿量。此外，还开发了 GAP 编程包来自动化这些计算。

title: Altermagnons at the metal-insulator transition
abstract: By means of slave-boson theory for the Hubbard model on the checkerboard lattice, we calculate dynamical altermagnetic spin susceptibilities from the metallic to the Mott-insulating regime. We track magnon dispersion and lifetime renormalization, allowing us to uncover a crossover from a chirality-selective dissipation of magnon modes to coherent yet strongly deformed chiral magnon branches across the metal insulator transition. Our formalism lends itself to a quantitative description of collective spin dynamics in correlated altermagnets.
summary: 通过棋盘晶格上哈伯德模型的从玻色子理论，我们计算了从金属态到莫特绝缘态的动态交变磁自旋磁化率。我们跟踪磁振子色散和寿命重整化，使我们能够发现从磁振子模式的手性选择性耗散到跨金属绝缘体转变的相干但强烈变形的手性磁振子分支的交叉。我们的形式主义有助于对相关交流磁体中的集体自旋动力学进行定量描述。

title: Barnett effect in rotating spinor dipolar quantum droplets
abstract: We propose releasing the spin degree of freedom to stabilize the vortex state in self-bound droplets of dipolar Bose-Einstein condensates. When a vortex is embedded into the droplet, spontaneous magnetization arises in the axial direction via a mechanism similar to the Barnett effect; that is, the orbital angular momentum is transferred to the spin angular momentum. When an external magnetic field is applied to the spontaneously magnetized droplet, the entire atomic cloud starts to rotate without changing its shape, which can be regarded as mechanical Larmor precession of a macroscopic object. A chirally different pair of droplets can form a stable bound state because of the attractive interaction between the spontaneously magnetized droplets.
summary: 我们建议释放自旋自由度以稳定偶极玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚自束缚液滴中的涡旋状态。当涡流嵌入液滴中时，通过类似于巴尼特效应的机制在轴向上产生自发磁化；也就是说，轨道角动量转移到自旋角动量。当对自发磁化的液滴施加外部磁场时，整个原子云开始旋转而不改变其形状，这可以视为宏观物体的机械拉莫尔进动。由于自发磁化液滴之间的吸引力相互作用，一对手性不同的液滴可以形成稳定的束缚态。

title: Nanostructure of PEGDA-PEG hydrogel membranes and how it controls their permeability
abstract: The spacial heterogeneity of hydrogels composed of PEGDA and added polymer chains is expected to play a crucial role on their transport properties which can be exploited in filtration or tissue engineering. However little is known about the arrangement of the polymer chains in the matrix and the length scales of these heterogeneities. Here we combine solid-state NMR and Small Angle Neutron Scattering to unravel the structure and dynamics of PEGDA hydrogels containing added PEG chains of various concentrations. Our results show that the samples present heterogeneities in both the PEGDA and PEG concentrations and suggest that the PEG chains entangle with the PEGDA network. When plotting the sample permeability, K, as a function the specific surface of the PEGDA heterogeneities we obtain a master curve, showing that the heterogeneity of the PEGDA matrix controls the permeability of the sample. Moreover the scaling K ___ V/S suggests a structure composed of facetted PEGDA/PEG heterogeneities separated by a network of aqueous thin and flattened films in which the water can permeate.
summary: 由 PEGDA 和添加的聚合物链组成的水凝胶的空间异质性预计将对其传输特性发挥至关重要的作用，可用于过滤或组织工程。然而，人们对基质中聚合物链的排列以及这些异质性的长度尺度知之甚少。在这里，我们结合固态核磁共振和小角中子散射来揭示含有不同浓度的 PEG 链的 PEGDA 水凝胶的结构和动力学。我们的结果表明，样品在 PEGDA 和 PEG 浓度方面均呈现异质性，并表明 PEG 链与 PEGDA 网络缠结。当绘制样品渗透性 K 作为 PEGDA 异质性比表面的函数时，我们获得了主曲线，表明 PEGDA 基质的异质性控制着样品的渗透性。此外，K ___ V/S 的比例表明了一种由多面 PEGDA/PEG 异质性组成的结构，这些异质性被水性薄膜网络分隔开，水可以渗透到其中。

title: Theory and Discovery of Electrides
abstract: Electrides are materials with electrons localized at interstitial regions of the crystal lattice and have been identified as promising candidates for a variety of applications, including catalysis, electron emission, and superconductivity. We present a theoretical framework for the origin of interstitial electrons in electrides. We demonstrate that this theory can explain electride-like behavior in prototypical electrides, and we use it to develop descriptors for the high-throughput discovery of new inorganic electride candidates from first principles. We also show that the same concepts can explain electride-like behavior in other classes of material, including high-pressure electrides and organic electrides and, more broadly, provide an alternative understanding of F-center defects and solvated electrons.
summary: 电子化合物是电子位于晶格间隙区域的材料，已被认为是多种应用的有希望的候选材料，包括催化、电子发射和超导。我们提出了电子化合物中间隙电子起源的理论框架。我们证明该理论可以解释原型电子化合物中的类电子化合物行为，并且我们用它来开发描述符，用于根据第一原理高通量发现新的无机电子化合物候选者。我们还表明，相同的概念可以解释其他类别材料中的类电子化物行为，包括高压电子化物和有机电子化物，并且更广泛地提供对 F 中心缺陷和溶剂化电子的另一种理解。

title: CERTIFY-ED: A Multi-Layer Verification Framework for Exact Diagonalization of Quantum Many-Body Systems
abstract: Exact diagonalization (ED) is a workhorse technique in computational quantum many-body physics, but published ED results are rarely accompanied by machine-checkable evidence of their numerical correctness. The community typically relies on the implicit trust chain LAPACK $\to$ user code $\to$ result, with at most informal agreement against another package treated as confirmation. We argue that this practice is inadequate for a method whose output frequently underpins theoretical claims, and we present \textsc{certify-ed}, a verification framework designed to be used \emph{alongside} existing ED packages (QuSpin, XDiag, ALPS) rather than as a replacement for them. The framework consists of (i) a multi-oracle eigensolver that runs three independent LAPACK paths and reports their pairwise disagreement, (ii) thirteen logically independent validation layers covering algebraic invariants, analytic limits, alternative algorithms, arbitrary-precision reference computation, conservation laws, dynamical consistency, and finite-size scaling, and (iii) tamper-evident SHA-256 hashed certificates that downstream consumers can verify. The framework also ships an error-injection layer that confirms the entire pipeline detects six injected error classes. Running on sixteen physics models from one-dimensional spin chains to two-dimensional Kitaev honeycomb clusters, our reference implementation passes 53 of 53 unit tests and 81 of 81 individual validation tests in under thirty seconds, with maximum disagreement against QuSpin of $1.6\times 10^{-14}$ across 320 eigenvalue comparisons, and agreement with 50-digit \texttt{mpmath} reference values to $1.6\times 10^{-15}$. The package is released under the MIT license on Zenodo and Github
summary:
精确对角化 (ED) 是计算量子多体物理中的一项主力技术，但已发表的 ED 结果很少附有机器可检查的数值正确性证据。社区通常依赖于隐式信任链 LAPACK $\to$ 用户代码 $\to$ 结果，至多对另一个包的非正式协议被视为确认。我们认为这种做法对于输出经常支持理论主张的方法来说是不够的，因此我们提出了 \textsc{certify-ed}，这是一个验证框架，旨在与 \emph{与现有 ED 软件包（QuSpin、XDiag、ALPS）一起使用，而不是作为它们的替代品。该框架由 (i) 一个运行三个独立 LAPACK 路径并报告其成对分歧的多预言本征解算器组成，(ii) 十三个逻辑上独立的验证层，涵盖代数不变量、分析极限、替代算法、任意精度参考计算、守恒定律、动态一致性和有限尺寸缩放，以及 (iii) 下游消费者可以验证的防篡改 SHA-256 哈希证书。

该框架还提供了一个错误注入层，用于确认整个管道检测到六个注入的错误类别。我们的参考实现在从一维自旋链到二维 Kitaev 蜂窝簇的 16 个物理模型上运行，在 30 秒内通过了 53 个单元测试中的 53 个和 81 个单独验证测试中的 81 个，在 320 个特征值比较中与 QuSpin 的最大分歧为 $1.6\times 10^{-14}$，并与 50 位 \texttt{mpmath} 参考值一致$1.6\times 10^{-15}$。该软件包根据 MIT 许可证在 Zenodo 和 Github 上发布

title: Relationship between doping-induced in-gap states and spin excitations in Kitaev-Hubbard models
abstract: We investigate the connection between doping-induced in-gap states and underlying spin excitations in Mott insulators by employing cluster perturbation theory on one-dimensional (1D) and quasi-1D Kitaev-Hubbard models. By manipulating Kitaev-like hopping terms ($t^{\prime}$) that selectively control spin anisotropies in the strong-coupling limit, we establish a direct correspondence between the kinetic dispersion of the in-gap states and the spin excitation spectra. Specifically, in the Z chain, in-gap states evolve from a gapless dispersion to a gapped flat band as the system transitions from the Heisenberg to the Ising model, exhibiting a gap scaling of $2t^{\prime 2}/U$ that matches the Ising spin gap. In the XY chain, the in-gap states split into a dispersive and a flat branch at the Kitaev limit, perfectly mirroring the Jordan-Wigner fermionic spectrum. For the two-leg ladder, we observe an emergent broad continuum of in-gap states that reflects the fractionalization of spin excitations, accompanied by a gap manifesting the presence of topological $Z_2$ visons. Our results establish a robust correspondence between charge and spin dynamics in doped Mott insulators and demonstrate that in-gap states can serve as a probe of exotic quantum spin phenomena, including fractionalization and topological excitations, offering a new pathway to investigate spin liquids via spectroscopic probes of charge excitations.
summary:
我们通过在一维 (1D) 和准一维 Kitaev-Hubbard 模型上采用簇微扰理论，研究了莫特绝缘体中掺杂引起的带内态与潜在自旋激发之间的联系。通过操纵类似基塔耶夫的跳跃项（$t^{\prime}$）选择性地控制强耦合极限内的自旋各向异性，我们在带隙态的动力学色散和自旋激发光谱之间建立了直接对应关系。具体来说，在 Z 链中，随着系统从海森堡模型过渡到伊辛模型，带隙内态从无带隙色散演变为带隙平带，表现出与伊辛自旋带隙匹配的 $2t^{\prime 2}/U$ 的带隙缩放。在 XY 链中，带隙内态在基塔耶夫极限处分裂成色散和平分支，完美地反映了 Jordan-Wigner 费米子谱。对于两腿梯子，我们观察到一个出现的带隙内态的广泛连续体，它反映了自旋激发的分数化，同时伴随着一个间隙，表明拓扑 $Z_2$ 视觉的存在。

我们的结果在掺杂莫特绝缘体中的电荷和自旋动力学之间建立了牢固的对应关系，并证明带隙内态可以作为奇异量子自旋现象的探针，包括分数化和拓扑激发，为通过电荷激发的光谱探针研究自旋液体提供了一条新途径。

title: Critical Dynamics of Non-Reciprocally Coupled Conserved Systems
abstract: Non-reciprocal systems have been shown to sustain time-dependent patterns, most prominently travelling waves. The transition into these time-dependent states generally breaks time-translational invariance, representing a clear deviation from equilibrium dynamics. Though common implementations of non-reciprocity lead to such phenomenology, these spatio-temporal patterns are absent in other models. In the same vein, the ensuing scaling behaviour also depends on the precise way non-reciprocity is implemented. To better understand the effects of different non-reciprocal interactions, we study the critical conserved dynamics of non-reciprocally coupled spin systems. Specifically, we consider the dynamics of two $n$-component order parameter fields $\boldsymbol{\phi}_i$ with $i \in\{1,2\}$. Unlike the common implementations of non-reciprocal interactions, we introduce the non-reciprocity solely through the non-linear interaction between the distinct species. Using the field-theoretic renormalisation group (RG) procedure, we perform a one-loop analysis and show that at one-loop level, the critical behaviour depends on the microscopic value of certain quantities. Using the flow functions, we elucidate the behaviour of the fixed points for different bare microscopic values. We also show that for $n \geq 4$, there is a fixed point where the ensuing critical dynamics asymptotically obey detailed-balance, implying the emergent dynamics are agnostic to the microscopic non-reciprocity on large scales. Finally, we show that the conserved dynamics reduces the number of independent scaling exponents, mimicking the effect of a standard fluctuation-dissipation relation.
summary:
非互易系统已被证明能够维持与时间相关的模式，最显着的是行波。向这些时间相关状态的转变通常会打破时间平移不变性，代表与平衡动力学的明显偏差。尽管非互易的常见实现会导致这种现象，但这些时空模式在其他模型中是不存在的。同样，随后的扩展行为也取决于非互惠性实施的精确方式。为了更好地理解不同非互易相互作用的影响，我们研究了非互易耦合自旋系统的临界守恒动力学。具体来说，我们考虑两个 $n$ 分量顺序参数字段 $\boldsymbol{\phi}_i$ 和 $i \in\{1,2\}$ 的动态。与非互易相互作用的常见实现不同，我们仅通过不同物种之间的非线性相互作用引入非互易性。使用场论重正化群（RG）过程，我们进行了单循环分析，并表明在单循环水平上，关键行为取决于某些量的微观值。

使用流函数，我们阐明了不同裸微观值的固定点的行为。我们还表明，对于 $n \geq 4$，存在一个固定点，随后的临界动力学渐近服从详细平衡，这意味着新兴动力学与大尺度上的微观非互易性是不可知的。最后，我们表明，守恒动力学减少了独立标度指数的数量，模仿了标准波动耗散关系的效果。

title: Topological edge states of the hexagonal linear chain
abstract: We study the eigenspectrum properties of a one-dimensional molecular chain composed of hexagonal unit cells. The system features two alternating hopping parameters, resulting in a rich energy spectrum with both dispersive and flat bands. By analyzing the model under periodic and open boundary conditions, we identify two insulating phases separated by a gap-closing transition controlled by the ratio of hopping amplitudes. In the topological phase, realized when the hopping ratio falls below a critical value, edge states emerge that are exponentially localized at the boundaries of finite chains.
summary: 我们研究由六方晶胞组成的一维分子链的特征谱特性。该系统具有两个交替的跳跃参数，从而产生具有色散和平带的丰富能谱。通过分析周期性和开放边界条件下的模型，我们确定了由跳变幅度比控制的间隙闭合转变分隔开的两个绝缘相。在拓扑阶段，当跳频比低于临界值时，会出现边缘状态，这些边缘状态呈指数局部化在有限链的边界处。

title: Staggered spin susceptibility at a two-dimensional antiferromagnetic quantum critical point
abstract: We report on the finite temperature staggered spin susceptibility $\chi(Q)$ as a function of the mode-mode coupling constant $y_1$ in the self-consistent renormalization theory of two-dimensional antiferromagnetic spin fluctuations with zero-point quantum fluctuations just at the quantum critical point ($y_0$ = 0). We find that the value $y_1$ = 0.1 is a criterion to classify the effect of the zero-point spin fluctuations on the temperature dependence of $\chi(Q)$ into a Curie law for weak $y_1 < $ 0.1 and a Curie-Weiss type or a power law type for strong $y_1 > $ 0.1.
summary: 我们报告了二维反铁磁自旋涨落自洽重正化理论中的有限温度交错自旋磁化率 $\chi(Q)$ 作为模式-模式耦合常数 $y_1$ 的函数，且在量子临界点 ($y_0$ = 0) 处具有零点量子涨落。我们发现值$y_1$ = 0.1是一个标准，将零点自旋涨落对$\chi(Q)$温度依赖性的影响分类为弱$y_1 < $ 0.1的居里定律和强$y_1 > $ 0.1的居里-魏斯型或幂律型。

title: Vacancy-Enhanced $N-N$ Bonding and Deep Level Complex Defect Formation in $β-Ga_2O_3$
abstract: The formation and electronic properties of nitrogen-related defect complexes in $\beta-Ga_2O_3$ are investigated using first-principles calculations. Starting from the energetically favorable $N_{i9}-N_{OI}$ configuration, nitrogen atoms exhibit a strong tendency toward co-localization, leading to reduced $N-N$ separation. However, analysis of bond lengths and electron localization function shows that these configurations do not fully attain molecular $N_{2}$ character. The role of intrinsic defects is further examined by introducing oxygen and gallium vacancies. Vacancy-assisted configurations enhance local lattice relaxation and further decrease the $N-N$ distance. Formation energy calculations indicate that several vacancy-assisted complexes are thermodynamically favorable, while binding energy analysis confirms their stability against dissociation. Despite this, the density of states analysis reveals that all configurations introduce localized electronic states within the band gap. These states originate primarily from hybridized $N$-$2p$ and $O$-$2p$ orbitals and remain energetically separated from the band edges. Spin density analysis further confirms strong localization. Overall, these defect complexes act as deep trapping centers, limiting carrier transport in $\beta-Ga_2O_3$ and thereby promoting semi-insulating behavior and current blocking characteristics.
summary:
使用第一原理计算研究了 $\beta-Ga_2O_3$ 中与氮相关的缺陷复合物的形成和电子性质。从能量上有利的 $N_{i9}-N_{OI}$ 构型开始，氮原子表现出强烈的共定位倾向，导致 $N-N$ 分离减少。然而，键长和电子定位功能的分析表明这些构型并未完全达到分子$N_{2}$特征。通过引入氧和镓空位进一步研究了本征缺陷的作用。空位辅助配置增强了局部晶格弛豫并进一步减小了$N-N$距离。形成能计算表明，几种空位辅助配合物在热力学上是有利的，而结合能分析证实了它们对解离的稳定性。尽管如此，态密度分析表明所有配置都会在带隙内引入局域电子态。这些态主要源自杂化的 $N$-$2p$ 和 $O$-$2p$ 轨道，并保持与能带边缘的能量分离。自旋密度分析进一步证实了强局域化。

总体而言，这些缺陷复合物充当深捕获中心，限制 $\beta-Ga_2O_3$ 中的载流子传输，从而促进半绝缘行为和电流阻​​断特性。

title: Statistical Potential for Identical Fermions: Emergent Attraction and Pauli Crystal Formation
abstract: We show that the thermodynamics of $N$ identical fermions maps onto that of distinguishable particles governed by a collective statistical potential -- the microscopic origin of degeneracy pressure. Known to be purely repulsive for ${N=2}$, this potential develops attractive contributions for ${N\geq 3}$. Its minima coincide with Pauli crystal configurations, providing the energetic origin of these structures. For large $N$, the dominant force is attractive on inner shells and repulsive on outer ones -- not of two-body origin. The global minimum undergoes discrete melting transitions at specific temperatures.
summary: 我们证明，$N$ 相同费米子的热力学映射到受集体统计势（简并压力的微观起源）控制的可区分粒子的热力学。已知对于 ${N=2}$ 来说纯粹是令人排斥的，但这种潜力却对 ${N\geq 3}$ 产生了有吸引力的贡献。它的最小值与泡利晶体结构一致，提供了这些结构的能量起源。对于大的$N$，主导力对内壳具有吸引力，对外壳具有排斥力——不是二体起源的。全局最小值在特定温度下经历离散的熔化转变。

title: $H$-linear magnetoresistance in NbSe$_2$ due to impeded cyclotron motion
abstract: Linear magnetoresistance (LMR) is a widespread phenomenon observed in a host of quantum materials ranging from semiconductor nanostructures to quantum critical and strange metals. While multiple scenarios to explain LMR have been proposed, a complete understanding of the phenomenon remains elusive. Indeed, it is highly likely that the origin of LMR depends on the specific electronic state. Here, we report a study of the impact of disorder on the form of the magnetoresistance of the prototypical charge-density-wave (CDW) compound 2$H$-NbSe$_2$. The magnetoresistance is shown to exhibit strong qualitative and quantitative agreement with Boltzmann transport analysis incorporating impeded cyclotron motion (ICM). We identify the source of ICM in 2$H$-NbSe$_2$ as strong scattering sinks where the CDW order connects the high temperature Fermi cylinders. Such unusual "hotspots" provide an explanation for the observed LMR as well as for the long-unexplained absence of quantum oscillations inside the charge ordered state in 2$H$-NbSe$_2$. These findings provide strong evidence that ICM generates LMR in certain correlated metals.
summary: 线性磁阻（LMR）是在从半导体纳米结构到量子临界和奇异金属的许多量子材料中观察到的一种普遍现象。虽然已经提出了多种解释 LMR 的方案，但对该现象的完整理解仍然难以实现。事实上，LMR 的起源很可能取决于特定的电子态。在这里，我们报告了无序对典型电荷密度波（CDW）化合物2$H$-NbSe$_2$磁阻形式影响的研究。磁阻与结合受阻回旋加速器运动 (ICM) 的玻尔兹曼输运分析表现出强烈的定性和定量一致性。我们将 2$H$-NbSe$_2$ 中的 ICM 源确定为强散射汇，其中 CDW 阶连接高温费米柱面。这种不寻常的“热点”为观察到的 LMR 以及 2$H$-NbSe$_2$ 中电荷有序态内长期无法解释的量子振荡的缺失提供了解释。这些发现提供了强有力的证据表明 ICM 在某些相关金属中产生 LMR。

title: Discovery of High-Voltage Magnesium-Ion Cathodes using Machine Learning and First-Principles Calculations
abstract: Developing high-performance cathode materials for magnesium-ion batteries (MIBs) remains challenging because Mg$^{2+}$ ions move slowly, and conventional materials exhibit low voltage outputs. In this study, machine learning and first-principles calculations were combined to investigate topological quantum materials (TQMs) as a new class of cathode candidates. A modified crystal graph convolutional neural network (mCGCNN) was used to screen 917 Mg-containing TQMs, identifying a small subset of materials with predicted voltages above 3 V and high volumetric capacities. Among these, Mg$_2$VO$_4$ and Mg$_6$MnO$_8$ were selected for detailed density functional theory (DFT) analysis. Formation energy and convex-hull calculations indicate that Mg$_x$VO$_4$ exhibits a fully stable magnesiation pathway, whereas Mg$_x$MnO$_8$ demonstrates minor metastability at intermediate compositions. The calculated voltage profiles yield average voltages of 3.66 V for Mg$_2$VO$_4$ and 4.06 V for Mg$_6$MnO$_8$, in good agreement with machine learning predictions. Electronic structure analysis, supported by Wannier interpolation, confirms that both materials are semiconducting, with valence bands dominated by O $2p$ states and conduction bands by transition-metal $d$ states, indicating a charge-transfer redox mechanism. Compared to conventional Mg cathodes, these TQMs exhibit higher voltages and competitive capacities, underscoring their potential for next-generation multivalent batteries. This study demonstrates that integrating machine learning with first-principles calculations offers an efficient approach for discovering and understanding novel cathode materials.
summary:
开发用于镁离子电池（MIB）的高性能阴极材料仍然具有挑战性，因为 Mg$^{2+}$ 离子移动缓慢，并且传统材料表现出低电压输出。在这项研究中，机器学习和第一原理计算相结合，研究拓扑量子材料（TQM）作为一类新型阴极候选材料。使用改进的晶体图卷积神经网络 (mCGCNN) 筛选 917 种含镁 TQM，识别预测电压高于 3 V 和高体积容量的一小部分材料。其中，选择Mg$_2$VO$_4$和Mg$_6$MnO$_8$进行详细的密度泛函理论（DFT）分析。地层能和凸包计算表明 Mg$_x$VO$_4$ 表现出完全稳定的镁化途径，而 Mg$_x$MnO$_8$ 在中间成分下表现出较小的亚稳定性。计算得出的电压曲线得出 Mg$_2$VO$_4$ 的平均电压为 3.66 V，Mg$_6$MnO$_8$ 的平均电压为 4.06 V，与机器学习预测非常吻合。

Wannier 插值法支持的电子结构分析证实，这两种材料都是半导体，其价带以 O $2p$ 态为主，导带以过渡金属 $d$ 态为主，表明电荷转移氧化还原机制。与传统的镁阴极相比，这些 TQM 表现出更高的电压和有竞争力的容量，凸显了它们作为下一代多价电池的潜力。这项研究表明，将机器学习与第一原理计算相结合，为发现和理解新型正极材料提供了一种有效的方法。

title: Enhanced Impact Mitigation via 3D-Multilayered Material Architectures
abstract: Materials designed by nature commonly exhibit functional grading and laminated structures, particularly when intended for enhanced impact protection. Synthetic materials have also found success in exploiting this concept with fully dense but spatially varying architectures, as is the case with advanced fiber-based composites. In the lightweight materials space, porous architected materials have shown benefits for extreme impact mitigation, proving to be advantageous in dissipating large amounts of energy per unit mass, but rarely harness the benefits of layering or functional grading in designs. Here, a design paradigm for lightweight multilayered materials towards high impact-mitigation efficacy is demonstrated, showing that the use of alternating monolithic and beam-based architectures leads to enhanced and predictable responses under extreme conditions. These layered, mass-equivalent `heterostructures' with different ordering and proportions of octet and monolithic layers outperform single-architecture lattices on a mass-normalized energy dissipation basis by >50% when subjected to supersonic microparticle impact. Through analysis that combines wave-propagation analysis, nonlinear finite element simulations, and post-impact crater reconstruction, layer-by-layer mechanical properties are mapped to crater formation and energy dissipation behaviors. This heterostructure design framework offers a simple approach towards tuning failure and impact resistance of materials for protective applications from Whipple shields to sports equipment.
summary:
自然设计的材料通常表现出功能分级和层压结构，特别是当旨在增强冲击保护时。合成材料也成功地利用了这一概念，具有完全致密但空间变化的结构，就像先进的纤维基复合材料的情况一样。在轻质材料领域，多孔建筑材料已显示出缓解极端冲击的优势，事实证明在耗散单位质量的大量能量方面具有优势，但很少在设计中利用分层或功能分级的优势。在这里，展示了一种实现高冲击缓解功效的轻质多层材料的设计范例，表明交替使用整体式和基于梁的架构可以在极端条件下实现增强且可预测的响应。当受到超音速微粒撞击时，这些具有不同排序和比例的八位组和整体层的分层、质量等效的“异质结构”在质量归一化能量耗散的基础上优于单一结构晶格> 50％。

通过结合波传播分析、非线性有限元模拟和撞击后陨石坑重建的分析，将逐层力学特性映射到陨石坑的形成和能量耗散行为。这种异质结构设计框架提供了一种简单的方法来调节材料的失效和抗冲击性，适用于从惠普尔防护罩到运动器材的防护应用。

title: Cell divisions suppress dynamical correlations in solid tissues
abstract: Developing tissues often maintain mechanical coherence while continuously remodeling through cellular processes such as cell divisions and rearrangements. In this way, they are an example of amorphous solids. In passive amorphous solids, local rearrangements can trigger one another through long-ranged elastic interactions, leading to system-spanning avalanches near yielding. Whether similar collective dynamics should be expected in living tissues is unclear, because cell divisions generate stress and remodeling events independently of local mechanical stability. Here, we address this question using a two-dimensional elastoplastic model in which cell divisions are treated as active plastic events. We find that while cell divisions fluidize the tissue below the passive yield stress, but preserve the marginal stability in the quasistatic limit. However, they also strongly suppress the system-spanning avalanches of cell rearrangements, in constrast with the expected behavior in passive amorphous solids. Finally, we show that the avalanche supression originates from the energy balance in the system. Namely, the energy injected by cell divisions allows for shear flow below the yield stress, but also provides a finite budget for rearrangements. These results suggest that proliferating tissues display the structural hallmarks of marginal amorphous solids while exhibiting much shorter-ranged correlations in dynamics, compared to passive amorphous solids.
summary:
发育中的组织通常保持机械一致性，同时通过细胞分裂和重排等细胞过程不断重塑。这样，它们就是无定形固体的一个例子。在被动非晶固体中，局部重排可以通过长程弹性相互作用相互触发，导致接近屈服的跨系统雪崩。目前还不清楚活体组织中是否会出现类似的集体动力学，因为细胞分裂会产生独立于局部机械稳定性的应力和重塑事件。在这里，我们使用二维弹塑性模型来解决这个问题，其中细胞分裂被视为活跃的塑性事件。我们发现，虽然细胞分裂使组织在被动屈服应力以下流态化，但在准静态极限下保持了边缘稳定性。然而，它们还强烈抑制了跨系统的细胞重排雪崩，这与被动非晶固体中的预期行为相反。最后，我们证明雪崩抑制源于系统中的能量平衡。

也就是说，细胞分裂注入的能量允许剪切流低于屈服应力，但也为重排提供了有限的预算。这些结果表明，与被动非晶固体相比，增殖组织表现出边缘非晶固体的结构特征，同时在动力学方面表现出更短范围的相关性。

title: Identifying the relevant parameters in design strategies for stable glasses
abstract: A glass is conventionally obtained by cooling a bulk supercooled liquid through its glass transition temperature. The discovery of ultrastable glasses prepared using physical vapor deposition, together with the recent multiplication of numerical algorithms created to increase the stability of glasses, demonstrates the existence of a variety of strategies for designing glasses with different physical properties. This raises a broader question: which parameters most strongly govern the enhancement of glass stability? Existing computational strategies often produce highly stable glasses by optimizing certain physical properties through dynamical changes in particle diameters. We challenge the idea that these physical quantities are causally responsible for glass stability and suggest instead that diameter dynamics is the principal source of enhanced stability. To support our view, we introduce computational methods to optimize physical quantities without changing the particle diameters. Using the examples of enhanced hyperuniformity at large scale and local ordering at small scale, we design glass configurations with highly optimized values compared to bulk equilibrium states. However, these glasses do not show enhanced stability. The proposed physical quantities are correlated with glass stability, but are not causally responsible for ultrastability. These findings indicate that design rules for stable glasses should be reinterpreted in terms of the dynamical processes that generate stability, rather than the optimized physical quantities they target.
summary:
玻璃通常是通过将大量过冷液体冷却至其玻璃化转变温度而获得的。使用物理气相沉积制备的超稳定玻璃的发现，以及最近为提高玻璃稳定性而创建的数值算法的倍增，证明了设计具有不同物理特性的玻璃的多种策略的存在。这就提出了一个更广泛的问题：哪些参数最有力地控制玻璃稳定性的增强？现有的计算策略通常通过粒径的动态变化来优化某些物理特性，从而产生高度稳定的玻璃。我们质疑这些物理量与玻璃稳定性有因果关系的观点，并建议直径动力学是增强稳定性的主要来源。为了支持我们的观点，我们引入了计算方法来优化物理量而不改变颗粒直径。利用大尺度增强超均匀性和小尺度局部有序性的例子，我们设计了与整体平衡状态相比具有高度优化值的玻璃配置。

然而，这些玻璃并未表现出增强的稳定性。所提出的物理量与玻璃稳定性相关，但与超稳定性无关。这些发现表明，稳定玻璃的设计规则应该根据产生稳定性的动态过程来重新解释，而不是根据它们所针对的优化物理量。

title: Engineering few-layer graphene by S-doping: from sustaining linear dispersion to flat bands
abstract: Motivated by the technological relevance of S-doped few-layer graphene (FLG) in battery applications and in the oxygen reduction reaction, we systematically explore the effect of basal plane S-doping on the electronic properties of mono-, bi-, and four-layer graphene, using first-principles calculations with van der Waals corrections. In the monolayer we find a variety of effects ranging from a sustained Dirac cone with localized impurity bands away from the Fermi level in thiophenic doping (2V1S) to a band gap opening of 0.4 eV and flat bands close to the Fermi-level in graphitic doping (1V1S) and an additional $n$-type doping together with spin-polarization, when three S-atoms are adsorbed in a four-site vacancy (4V3S). Incorporation in FLG leads to modification of the Dirac cone into a set of hyperbolic touching bands in 2V1S; reduction (bilayer) and closing of the band gap with additional hyperbolic touching bands in conjunction with the flat band at the Fermi level in 1V1S and 4V3S and a reduction of spin polarization in the latter. Overall, S-doping enables design of the band structure and tuning the electronic behavior of FLG from metallic to insulating and from linear dispersive to flat bands that makes S-doped FLG a promising material for versatile technological applications.
summary:
受硫掺杂少层石墨烯（FLG）在电池应用和氧还原反应中技术相关性的启发，我们利用第一性原理计算和范德华校正，系统地探讨了基面硫掺杂对单层、双层和四层石墨烯电子性能的影响。在单层中，我们发现了多种效应，从噻吩掺杂（2V1S）中远离费米能级的持续狄拉克锥体到石墨掺杂（1V1S）中接近费米能级的0.4 eV带隙开口和接近费米能级的平坦能带，以及当三个S原子吸附在四位点空位中时，额外的$n$型掺杂和自旋极化（4V3S）。纳入 FLG 导致狄拉克锥体修改为 2V1S 中的一组双曲接触带； 1V1S 和 4V3S 中费米能级的平带与额外的双曲接触带结合，减少（双层）和带隙闭合，并减少后者的自旋极化。

总体而言，S 掺杂能够设计能带结构，并将 FLG 的电子行为从金属性调整为绝缘性，从线性色散调整为平坦能带，这使得 S 掺杂 FLG 成为具有多种技术应用前景的材料。

title: Phase-slip residual-order spin state in FeSe
abstract: Clarifying the magnetic ground state is essential for analysing unconventional superconductivity, because microscopic magnetic order provides one of the basic starting assumptions for spin-fluctuation pairing theories. FeSe exhibits pronounced stripe- and Neel-type spin fluctuations yet lacks static long-range order, posing a long-standing puzzle. By combining PBE and r2SCAN mixed exchange-correlation calculations with spectrally weighted simulations of the static spin structure factor S(q), we show that FeSe is not governed by a single magnetic configuration but by a nearly degenerate manifold of phase-slip defects embedded in a stripe background. We term this state a residual-order spin state (ROSS): a spin state that retains local stripe-like antiferromagnetic correlations but loses long-range phase coherence because of phase slips. Multiple slip configurations are compressed into an exceptionally narrow energy window. Non-local magneto-elastic coupling redistributes domain-wall formation energy through the lattice, whereas competing magnetic interactions truncate the real-space coherence length to an optimal scale of about ten moments. Weighted superpositions of these slip states reproduce the momentum-space line shapes of both stripe- and Neel-type spin fluctuations observed by inelastic neutron scattering, providing a microscopic basis for superconductivity models built on spin fluctuations.
summary:
阐明磁基态对于分析非常规超导性至关重要，因为微观磁序为自旋涨落配对理论提供了基本的起始假设之一。 FeSe 表现出明显的条纹型和尼尔型自旋涨落，但缺乏静态长程有序，这是一个长期存在的难题。通过将 PBE 和 r2SCAN 混合交换相关计算与静态自旋结构因子 S(q) 的谱加权模拟相结合，我们表明 FeSe 不是由单一磁配置控制，而是由嵌入条带背景中的近简并流形相滑缺陷控制。我们将这种状态称为剩余阶自旋状态（ROSS）：一种保留局部条状反铁磁相关性但由于相位滑移而失去长程相位相干性的自旋状态。多个滑移配置被压缩到一个异常狭窄的能量窗口中。非局域磁弹性耦合通过晶格重新分配畴壁形成能量，而竞争性磁相互作用将实空间相干长度截断到大约十个矩的最佳尺度。

这些滑移态的加权叠加再现了非弹性中子散射观察到的条带型和尼尔型自旋涨落的动量空间线形状，为建立在自旋涨落基础上的超导模型提供了微观基础。

title: Link length and energy fluctuations in extensible freely jointed chains
abstract: The freely jointed chain is often applied to model the thermodynamics of single polymer chains, but the traditional formulation of the model lacks internal energy changes due to bond stretching. For this reason, the extensible freely jointed chain model includes a potential energy function, typically harmonic, that governs the length of each link in the chain. Among the other quantities of interest that are subject to thermal fluctuations, these link lengths and energies too fluctuate about their ensemble average values. Since a plethora of models for polymer chains and networks incorporate chain dissociation as a function of either link length or energy, these fluctuations are crucial to understand and quantify. Motivated by this fact, fluctuations in link length and energy are analyzed within a freely jointed chain under an applied force. These fluctuations are quantified through their average values, standard deviations, and probability distributions. Across all values, asymptotically correct analytic relations and their less ergonomic exact counterparts are introduced. The asymptotic relations are verified to be accurate through direct comparison and to be correct within transcendentally small terms through error analysis. In certain cases, the fluctuations are shown to be approximately normally distributed. Hereafter, model components predicated on link length or energy ought to account for these fluctuations.
summary:
自由连接链通常用于模拟单个聚合物链的热力学，但传统的模型公式缺乏由于键拉伸而导致的内能变化。因此，可扩展的自由连接链模型包括势能函数（通常是谐波），它控制链中每个链接的长度。在受热波动影响的其他感兴趣的量中，这些链路长度和能量也围绕其整体平均值波动。由于大量聚合物链和网络模型将链解离作为链接长度或能量的函数，因此这些波动对于理解和量化至关重要。受此事实的启发，我们分析了在施加力下自由连接的链条内链节长度和能量的波动。这些波动通过平均值、标准差和概率分布进行量化。在所有值中，引入了渐近正确的解析关系及其不太符合人体工程学的精确对应关系。

通过直接比较验证渐近关系是准确的，通过误差分析验证渐近关系在超越小项内是正确的。在某些情况下，波动显示为近似正态分布。此后，基于链路长度或能量的模型组件应该考虑这些波动。

title: Optical Response of a screw dislocated GaAs Quantum Wire: Temperature and Pressure Effects
abstract: We investigate the influence of a screw dislocation, characterized by the dislocation parameter, on the optical response of a parabolic GaAs cylindrical quantum wire under the combined effects of temperature, hydrostatic pressure, and the axial magnetic field. Using a torsion-modified metric together with pressure- and temperature-dependent material properties, namely the effective mass and dielectric permittivity, we obtain exact solutions of the Schrödinger equation in terms of Whittaker functions. The screw dislocation introduces a \(k_z\)-dependent coupling that breaks the symmetry between the angular momentum states \(m\) and \(-m\) and modifies the centrifugal term in the effective potential. Based on the resulting eigenstates, we evaluate the linear and third-order nonlinear optical absorption coefficients, as well as the corresponding refractive index changes, for the dipole-allowed transitions \(m = 0 \to +1\) and \(m = 0 \to -1\). Our results show that increasing the dislocation parameter produces a pronounced redshift and suppresses the resonance amplitude for the \(m = 0 \to +1\) transition, whereas the \(m = 0 \to -1\) transition exhibits a blueshift accompanied by peak enhancement. We further find that increasing temperature shifts the resonances toward higher photon energies and enhances their amplitudes, while hydrostatic pressure causes a redshift and reduces the peak intensity for both transitions. In addition, the magnetic field strengthens the optical response and induces a blueshift for the \(m = 0 \to +1\) transition, whereas the opposite behavior is obtained for the \(m = 0 \to -1\) transition. We have also examined the behavior of the refractive index changes, which exhibit analogous asymmetric dependence on the dislocation parameter.
summary:
我们研究了在温度、静水压力和轴向磁场的综合作用下，用位错参数表征的螺旋位错对抛物线 GaAs 圆柱形量子线的光学响应的​​影响。使用扭转修正度量以及与压力和温度相关的材料特性（即有效质量和介电常数），我们获得了薛定谔方程以 Whittaker 函数表示的精确解。螺旋位错引入了依赖于 \(k_z\) 的耦合，打破了角动量状态 \(m\) 和 \(-m\) 之间的对称性，并修改了有效势中的离心项。基于所得的本征态，我们评估了偶极子允许跃迁 \(m = 0 \to +1\) 和 \(m = 0 \to -1\) 的线性和三阶非线性光学吸收系数，以及相应的折射率变化。

我们的结果表明，增加位错参数会产生明显的红移并抑制\(m = 0 \to +1\)跃迁的共振幅度，而\(m = 0 \to -1\)跃迁则表现出蓝移并伴有峰值增强。我们进一步发现，温度升高会使共振向更高的光子能量转移并增强其振幅，而静水压力会导致红移并降低两种跃迁的峰值强度。此外，磁场增强了光学响应并引起\(m = 0 \to +1\)跃迁的蓝移，而\(m = 0 \to -1\)跃迁则获得相反的行为。我们还研究了折射率变化的行为，它表现出对位错参数的类似的不对称依赖性。

title: Variational approach to droplet motion on uneven solid surfaces, including contact line dynamics and evaporation
abstract: We show how dynamical equations for liquid films and drops on uneven surfaces, including contact line dynamics and evaporation/condensation effects, may be formulated as a variational dynamics, generated via Onsager's variational principle. The theory applies in the isothermal overdamped-dynamics limit. We apply this general approach to obtain several well-known results on contact line dynamics and to study drops pinning and sliding on inclined corrugated surfaces. This approach constructs the dynamical equations starting from the free energy of the system and therefore has the advantage that it naturally incorporates the correct equilibrium properties.
summary: 我们展示了如何将不平坦表面上的液膜和液滴的动力学方程（包括接触线动力学和蒸发/冷凝效应）表述为通过 Onsager 变分原理生成的变分动力学。该理论适用于等温过阻尼动力学极限。我们应用这种通用方法来获得接触线动力学的几个众所周知的结果，并研究倾斜波纹表面上的液滴钉扎和滑动。这种方法从系统的自由能开始构建动力学方程，因此具有自然地包含正确的平衡特性的优点。

title: Fluctuation spectra of embryonic cell-cell interfaces reveal inverse-square scaling
abstract: Tissue-scale shape changes are driven by ensembles of intracellular forces. However measuring force in these contexts remains a difficult challenge. Here we perform spectral analysis of transverse fluctuations of cell-cell junctions in \emph{Xenopus} embryonic tissue explants undergoing convergent extension. We developed an image analysis pipeline to extract fluctuation amplitude profiles $u(x,t)$ from time-lapse confocal movies and computed two-dimensional spatiotemporal power spectra. We observe power-law scaling of mean-squared fluctuation power spectra consistent with $\langle u_q^2 \rangle \sim q^{-2}$ and $\langle u_f^2 \rangle \sim f^{-2}$. The spatial scaling agrees with predictions from the Helfrich Hamiltonian, and the temporal scaling agrees with overdamped dynamics of a fluctuating membrane, both in the tension-dominated regime. Pharmacological reduction of actomyosin contractility (via low-dose blebbistatin or latrunculin B) did not significantly alter either scaling exponent. Our results provide an early empirical characterization of junction fluctuation spectra in an actively shape-changing tissue. Simple tension-dominated membrane models appear sufficient to describe transverse junction dynamics despite their active and coupled nature. This work establishes a quantitative baseline for future studies of tension-bearing tissues and motivates the development of physical models specific to multicellular systems.
summary:
组织尺度的形状变化是由细胞内力的集合驱动的。然而，在这些情况下测量力仍然是一个艰巨的挑战。在这里，我们对经历会聚延伸的 \emph{Xenopus} 胚胎组织外植体中细胞-细胞连接的横向波动进行光谱分析。我们开发了一种图像分析管道，用于从延时共焦电影中提取波动幅度轮廓 $u(x,t)$ 并计算二维时空功率谱。我们观察到均方波动功率谱的幂律缩放与 $\langle u_q^2 \rangle \sim q^{-2}$ 和 $\langle u_f^2 \rangle \sim f^{-2}$ 一致。空间尺度与赫尔弗里希哈密顿量的预测一致，时间尺度与波动膜的过阻尼动力学一致，两者都处于张力主导的状态。肌动球蛋白收缩力的药理学降低（通过低剂量的blebbistatin或latrunculin B）并没有显着改变任一缩放指数。我们的结果提供了主动变形组织中结波动光谱的早期经验表征。

简单的张力主导的膜模型似乎足以描述横向连接动力学，尽管它们具有主动和耦合的性质。这项工作为未来承受张力组织的研究建立了定量基线，并推动了多细胞系统特有的物理模型的开发。

title: Equivariant Space Group and Hamiltonian for Collinear Magnetic Systems
abstract: Condensed matter physics increasingly focuses on exploiting the magnetic order parameter orientation n as a tuning knob for properties of collinear magnetic materials, but a general method for constructing effective Hamiltonians with explicit n-dependence has been lacking. Here, we develop a symmetry-based framework, built on the equivariant space group, for constructing such Hamiltonians, termed equivariant magnetic Hamiltonians (EMHs). The resulting EMH lives in a higher-dimensional k-n space and exhibits unconventional symmetry actions and topological features. Using a 1D ferromagnetic chain and a 3D antiferromagnet as examples, we demonstrate that explicit n-dependence in EMHs enables the study of magnetic-dynamics-driven topological pumping, including even-integer charge pumping and a second-Chern-number-induced quantized pumping of surface anomalous Hall conductivity. Beyond model systems, we incorporate the framework into first-principles calculations to construct ab-initio EMHs that accurately capture the n-dependent band structures of real materials. The approach can also be generalized to non-collinear magnetic systems. Our work establishes a general framework for constructing EMHs and for exploring the rich physics arising from magnetic anisotropy and magnetic dynamics.
summary:
凝聚态物理越来越关注利用磁序参数方向 n 作为共线磁性材料特性的调节旋钮，但一直缺乏构建具有显式 n 依赖性的有效哈密顿量的通用方法。在这里，我们开发了一个基于对称的框架，建立在等变空间群的基础上，用于构造这样的哈密顿量，称为等变磁哈密顿量（EMH）。由此产生的 EMH 存在于更高维的 k-n 空间中，并表现出非常规的对称行为和拓扑特征。以 1D 铁磁链和 3D 反铁磁体为例，我们证明了 EMH 中的显式 n 依赖性使得能够研究磁动力学驱动的拓扑泵浦，包括偶整数电荷泵浦和表面反常霍尔电导率的二陈数诱导量子化泵浦。除了模型系统之外，我们还将该框架纳入第一原理计算中，以构建从头算 EMH，从而准确捕获真实材料的 n 相关能带结构。该方法还可以推广到非共线磁系统。

我们的工作为构建有效市场假说和探索磁各向异性和磁动力学产生的丰富物理现象建立了一个总体框架。

title: Designing Coulombic Contact Interactions between Polarizable Particles through Asymmetry
abstract: Polarizable particle systems, including charged colloids, polarizable ions, biomolecular assemblies, and soft nanomaterials, can exhibit contact electrostatic interactions that depart strongly from Coulomb behavior when dielectric mismatch and geometric singularities amplify polarization effects. Here we use charged dielectric spheres as a model system and show that these polarization contributions can be canceled by jointly tuning size, charge, and dielectric asymmetries. By extending a recently developed image-charge formula to contacting dielectric spheres, we derive analytical conditions under which the contact interaction reduces to the bare Coulomb form. Accurate two-sphere calculations validate the resulting contact design rules with relative errors below $3\%$. Strikingly, many-body molecular dynamics simulations reveal that systems satisfying these two-body rules self-assemble into structures that closely match their pure Coulomb references. These results establish asymmetry as a route for turning electrostatic complexity into Coulombic simplicity at contact, with implications for controlled self-assembly and materials design.
summary: 可极化粒子系统，包括带电胶体、可极化离子、生物分子组装体和软纳米材料，当介电失配和几何奇点放大极化效应时，可以表现出与库仑行为强烈背离的接触静电相互作用。在这里，我们使用带电介电球作为模型系统，并表明可以通过联合调整尺寸、电荷和介电不对称性来消除这些极化贡献。通过将最近开发的图像电荷公式扩展到接触介电球，我们推导出接触相互作用减少到裸库仑形式的分析条件。精确的两球计算验证了所得的接触设计规则，相对误差低于 $3\%$。引人注目的是，多体分子动力学模拟表明，满足这些二体规则的系统会自组装成与其纯库仑参考密切匹配的结构。这些结果确立了不对称性作为将静电复杂性转化为接触时库仑简单性的途径，对受控自组装和材料设计具有影响。

title: On the dilaton gravity of analogue black holes
abstract: We investigate which dilaton gravity models can reproduce the typical two dimensional analogue black holes realized in platforms such as superconducting quantum circuits. We identify the most reasonable assumptions these models must satisfy, and determine the dilaton models for which the state-dependence of the Hawking temperature, T, can be switched on and off, a feature that is absent in four dimensional black holes. When the analogue black hole exhibits state-independent temperature, as in the cases considered here, the kinematics governing T decouples from the dynamics underlying S. Our numerical analysis reveals that the given analogue black holes do not correspond to known dilaton gravity models, limiting their usefulness for extracting theoretical insights. We then show that the logic can be easily reversed: starting from established well known dilaton models, one can derive the conditions that laboratory implementations must satisfy. This shifts the challenge from the theoretical perspective to the experimental realization.
summary: 我们研究哪些膨胀引力模型可以重现在超导量子电路等平台中实现的典型二维模拟黑洞。我们确定了这些模型必须满足的最合理的假设，并确定了霍金温度 T 的状态依赖性可以打开和关闭的膨胀模型，这是四维黑洞中不存在的特征。当模拟黑洞表现出与状态无关的温度时，就像这里考虑的情况一样，控制 T 的运动学与 S 的动力学脱钩。我们的数值分析表明，给定的模拟黑洞与已知的膨胀引力模型不对应，限制了它们在提取理论见解方面的有用性。然后我们证明逻辑可以很容易地逆转：从已建立的众所周知的膨胀模型开始，可以推导出实验室实施必须满足的条件。这将挑战从理论角度转移到了实验实现。

title: CMB Birefringence from Vacuum Interfaces
abstract: Hints of cosmic microwave background polarization rotation ($\Delta\vartheta \sim 10^{-3}$ rad) are commonly attributed to late-time dynamics of ultralight axions. We show that such ultralight degrees of freedom are not required. Polarization rotation naturally arises as a geometric interface phase acquired when photons cross interfaces between topologically distinct dark sector vacua. The effect is a discrete phase shift fixed by the normalization of a wall-supported electromagnetic Chern--Simons interaction and protected by an emergent $1$-form symmetry of the low energy effective theory. This mechanism reproduces the familiar adiabatic rotation induced by light axion domain walls, but persists for arbitrarily thin walls where the axion is heavy or absent. In this regime the rotation manifests as a Pancharatnam phase localized at vacuum interfaces, independent of redshift and photon frequency below a natural ultraviolet cutoff. Cosmic birefringence thus emerges as a probe of vacuum structure in the dark sector, rather than of light-field dynamics.
summary: 宇宙微波背景偏振旋转（$\Delta\vartheta \sim 10^{-3}$ rad）的暗示通常归因于超轻轴子的晚期动力学。我们证明不需要这样的超轻自由度。当光子穿过拓扑不同的暗区真空之间的界面时，偏振旋转自然地作为获得的几何界面相位而出现。该效应是一种离散相移，由壁支持的电磁陈-西蒙斯相互作用的归一化固定，并受到低能有效理论的新兴 $1$ 形式对称性的保护。这种机制再现了由轻轴子域壁引起的常见绝热旋转，但对于轴子重或不存在的任意薄壁仍然存在。在这种情况下，旋转表现为位于真空界面的 Pancharatnam 相，与红移和低于自然紫外线截止的光子频率无关。因此，宇宙双折射成为暗区真空结构的探针，而不是光场动力学的探针。

title: Towards the Realization of the Dark Dimension Scenario in Hořava-Witten Theory
abstract: It has been suggested that Hořava-Witten theory could provide a concrete realization of the Dark Dimension Scenario. In this context, the observable Standard Model sector is naturally localized in the micron-sized large dimension, which is the interval in the eleventh direction. Considering Calabi-Yau manifolds supporting generic vector bundles including also abelian factors, we point out that symmetric tadpole cancellation on the $E_8$ walls has the potential to ameliorate some of the issues of such a realization, including too fast proton decay. By taking not only the hierarchically small value of the dark energy but also the size of the Standard Model gauge couplings into account, one is driven to a special infinite distance limit, which is the Hořava-Witten analogue of a limit recently at the focus of the M-theoretic Emergence Proposal. Extrapolating results obtained for BPS-saturated amplitudes, we speculate about the possibility of obtaining the moduli dependence of the scalar potential, the gauge couplings and the Planck scale by simple one-loop Schwinger integrals over towers of states.
summary: 有人认为霍拉瓦-维滕理论可以提供黑暗维度场景的具体实现。在这种背景下，可观测的标准模型扇区自然定位在微米级的大维度，即第十一个方向的区间。考虑到支持通用向量丛的 Calabi-Yau 流形还包括阿贝尔因子，我们指出 $E_8$ 墙上的对称蝌蚪抵消有可能改善这种实现的一些问题，包括质子衰变过快。通过不仅考虑暗能量的等级小值，而且考虑标准模型规范耦合的尺寸，人们被驱动到一个特殊的无限距离极限，这是最近 M 理论涌现提案的焦点的极限的 Hořava-Witten 模拟。外推 BPS 饱和振幅获得的结果，我们推测通过状态塔上的简单单环施温格积分获得标量势、规范耦合和普朗克尺度的模依赖性的可能性。

title: Positivity in Massive Spin-3/2 EFTs and the Planck-Suppressed Neighbourhood of Supergravity
abstract: It is well known that a strictly massless spin-$3/2$ particle can interact consistently only within supergravity. Recently, positivity arguments have shown that an effective field theory of a massive Majorana spin-$3/2$ particle admits a smooth $m \to 0$ limit only if a graviton is present and the four-fermion contact interactions are tuned to the values dictated by $\mathcal{N}=1$ supergravity. In this work, we investigate how this limit is approached at finite mass. Assuming that the graviton $t$-channel pole can be discarded, we derive non-forward, tree-level dispersive bounds on massive spin-3/2 contact operators and determine the region of effective couplings consistent with unitarity and analyticity. For sufficiently small $m$, we find that the allowed parameter space forms a bounded, Planck-suppressed neighbourhood of the supergravity point, defined by the supergravity values of the four-fermion couplings. The supergravity point lies on the boundary of this region. In the regime $m \ll M_{\rm Pl}$, the volume of the allowed region scales parametrically as \[ \mathrm{Vol} \sim \frac{m^{6}}{M_{\rm Pl}^{6}} \, , \] and shrinks to zero as $m \to 0$, smoothly reproducing the massless-limit results. The allowed region becomes unbounded when mass approaches the Planck scale. We further analyze the effect of including additional light scalar and pseudo-scalar degrees of freedom, motivated by the Polonyi model, and find that their couplings are also bounded in a way similar to the contact couplings and that it doesn't enlarge the allowed contact coupling space.
summary:
众所周知，严格无质量的自旋 $3/2$ 粒子只能在超重力范围内一致地相互作用。最近，实证性论证表明，只有当存在引力子并且四费米子接触相互作用被调整到由 $\mathcal{N}=1$ 超重力决定的值时，一个巨大的马约拉纳自旋 $3/2$ 粒子的有效场论才承认平滑的 $m \to 0$ 限制。在这项工作中，我们研究了如何在有限质量下接近这个极限。假设引力子 $t$ 通道极可以被丢弃，我们得出大量自旋 3/2 接触算子的非前向树级色散界限，并确定与幺正性和解析性一致的有效耦合区域。对于足够小的 $m$，我们发现允许的参数空间形成超重力点的有界普朗克抑制邻域，由四费米子耦合的超重力值定义。超重力点位于该区域的边界上。

在 $m \ll M_{\rm Pl}$ 体系中，允许区域的体积按参数缩放为 \[ \mathrm{Vol} \sim \frac{m^{6}}{M_{\rm Pl}^{6}} \, , \] 并收缩到零，如 $m \to 0$，平滑地再现无质量极限结果。当质量接近普朗克尺度时，允许的区域变得无界。我们进一步分析了在 Polonyi 模型的推动下包含额外的光标量和赝标量自由度的效果，发现它们的耦合也以类似于接触耦合的方式有界，并且它不会扩大允许的接触耦合空间。

title: Compact space catalysis of false vacuum decay and Schwinger effect
abstract: We study zero-temperature false vacuum decay in $D$ compact spatial dimensions and show that for volumes below a critical value a new bounce solution, different from Coleman's celebrated $O(D)$ bubble, mediates the decay process, and typically leads to an exponentially enhanced decay rate. The bounce, when analytically continued to Lorentzian signature, nucleates a homogeneous field configuration for spatial volumes below a critical value, and quasi-homogeneous configurations for slightly larger volumes, and is not of the form of a thin or thick-walled bubble embedded in a false vacuum background. We explicitly show that the new bounce has the necessary features associated with false vacuum decay, following from its eigenvalue spectrum of fluctuations. The cross-over from homogeneous to quasi-homogeneous solutions as the spatial volume is increased is discussed, as is a real-time interpretation of the bounce. We apply this bounce to the study of a scalar field model, as well as a close cousin of the Schwinger effect that applies to $(1+1)d$ axion electrodynamics in compact space.
summary: 我们研究了 $D$ 紧凑空间维度中的零温假真空衰变，并表明，对于低于临界值的体积，与科尔曼著名的 $O(D)$ 气泡不同，新的弹跳解决方案会介导衰变过程，并且通常会导致衰变率呈指数级增长。当分析继续洛伦兹特征时，弹跳使低于临界值的空间体积形成均匀场配置，并为稍大的体积形成准均匀配置，并且不是嵌入假真空背景中的薄壁或厚壁气泡的形式。我们明确地表明，根据其波动的特征值谱，新的反弹具有与假真空衰变相关的必要特征。讨论了随着空间体积的增加从均匀解到准均匀解的交叉，以及反弹的实时解释。我们将这种反弹应用于标量场模型的研究，以及适用于紧凑空间 $(1+1)d$ 轴子电动力学的施温格效应的近亲。

title: Analytic Bootstrap of the Veneziano Amplitude
abstract: We analytically prove, to all orders, that the Veneziano amplitude is the unique outcome of a dual bootstrap based on dispersive sum rules, unitarity, and a small amount of additional stringy input. This stringy input can be either the string monodromy condition or the recently uncovered splitting and hidden-zero conditions. A key ingredient in our proofs is to interpret the dispersive sum rules as sequences of moments. Equally important is the precise incorporation of the extra stringy input into the amplitude ansatz, which makes the analytic bootstrap sufficiently rigid to fix the amplitude uniquely.
summary: 我们对所有阶次进行分析证明，Veneziano 幅度是基于色散和规则、幺正性和少量附加弦输入的双引导的唯一结果。该字符串输入可以是字符串单一条件，也可以是最近发现的分割和隐藏零条件。我们证明中的一个关键要素是将色散和规则解释为矩序列。同样重要的是，将额外的弦输入精确地纳入幅度模拟中，这使得分析引导程序足够刚性，可以唯一地固定幅度。

title: Stochastic inflation from a non-equilibrium renormalization group
abstract: Understanding stochastic inflation, and in particular the systematic computation of controlled corrections from first principles, remains an important open problem. In this work, we address this problem from two complementary perspectives. First, we derive the effective field theory governing long-wavelength modes from the reduced density matrix of a coarse-grained description. In this framework, locality in time follows from the thin-shell approximation, while locality in space is recovered dynamically in the super-Hubble regime. The resulting open effective field theory contains both dissipative and diffusive operators, with diffusion dominating as the coarse-graining scale is pushed into the infrared. This construction reproduces the usual Fokker-Planck equation at leading order and allows us to compute its corrections, including subleading contributions to the stochastic dynamics. Second, we study the evolution of the density matrix under changes of the coarse-graining scale. We show that this flow is governed by a Polchinski-type renormalisation group equation formulated directly for the density matrix. Dissipative and diffusive operators are generated dynamically along the flow, and the resulting effective action matches the Schwinger-Keldysh description. We derive a generalised Fokker-Planck equation directly from the renormalisation group flow, systematically incorporating subleading corrections and recovering the results obtained in the open effective field theory approach.
summary:
理解随机暴胀，特别是根据第一原理系统地计算受控修正，仍然是一个重要的悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们从两个互补的角度解决这个问题。首先，我们从粗粒度描述的简化密度矩阵中推导出控制长波长模式的有效场理论。在这个框架中，时间局部性遵循薄壳近似，而空间局部性在超哈勃体系中动态恢复。由此产生的开放有效场理论包含耗散算子和扩散算子，当粗粒度尺度被推入红外时，扩散占主导地位。这种结构再现了通常的前导阶福克-普朗克方程，并允许我们计算其修正，包括对随机动力学的次导贡献。其次，我们研究了粗粒度尺度变化下密度矩阵的演化。我们表明，该流受直接为密度矩阵制定的 Polchinski 型重整化群方程控制。

耗散算子和扩散算子是沿着流动动态生成的，所产生的有效作用与 Schwinger-Keldysh 描述相匹配。我们直接从重正化群流中推导出广义福克-普朗克方程，系统地结合次领先修正并恢复在开放有效场理论方法中获得的结果。

title: Aharonov--Casher effect from a supersymmetric N=1 D=4 model with Kalb--Ramond Lorentz-violating background: a SUSY-preserving mechanism via the Fayet--Iliopoulos term
abstract: The Aharonov--Casher (AC) effect describes the geometric phase acquired by a neutral particle carrying a magnetic dipole moment moving in an external electric field. In supersymmetric gauge theories it is often argued that exact supersymmetry enforces the vanishing of anomalous magnetic dipole moments, suggesting that the AC interaction may be incompatible with unbroken supersymmetry in four dimensions.
