In this work we show that this conclusion is model-dependent. We construct an $N=1$, $D=4$ supersymmetric gauge model in which a Lorentz-violating Kalb--Ramond background induces dynamically the dipole interaction responsible for the AC effect while leaving the supersymmetry algebra intact. The model couples a chiral superfield to an Abelian gauge superfield through a Chern--Simons--type interaction supplemented by a Fayet--Iliopoulos term. A duality identification between the symmetric combination $S+S^\dagger$ of the chiral superfield and the Kalb--Ramond superfield strength allows the antisymmetric tensor background to enter the supersymmetric dynamics without breaking supersymmetry. Integrating out the auxiliary $D$ field generates dynamically an effective dipole interaction of the form $\bar{\psi}\sigma^{\mu\nu}F_{\mu\nu}\psi$. In the nonrelativistic limit the resulting equation of motion reproduces the Aharonov--Casher Hamiltonian for a neutral fermion. The effective magnetic dipole moment is expressed in terms of the parameters of the model and can be mapped onto tensor coefficients of the fermion sector of the Standard Model Extension. Our results therefore provide an explicit realization of a four-dimensional supersymmetric theory in which the Aharonov--Casher interaction emerges dynamically while supersymmetry remains exact in the presence of Lorentz violation.
summary:
阿哈罗诺夫-卡舍尔 (AC) 效应描述了携带磁偶极矩的中性粒子在外部电场中运动时获得的几何相位。在超对称规范理论中，人们经常认为精确的超对称性会强制异常磁偶极矩的消失，这表明交流相互作用可能与四个维度上未破缺的超对称性不相容。在这项工作中，我们证明这个结论是模型相关的。我们构建了一个 $N=1$、$D=4$ 超对称规范模型，其中洛伦兹破坏的 Kalb-Ramond 背景动态地诱导产生交流效应的偶极子相互作用，同时保持超对称代数完好无损。该模型通过 Chern-Simons 型相互作用并辅以 Fayet-Iliopoulos 项，将手性超场与阿贝尔规范超场耦合起来。手性超场的对称组合$S+S^\dagger$与Kalb-Ramond超场强度之间的对偶识别允许反对称张量背景进入超对称动力学而不破坏超对称性。

对辅助 $D$ 场进行积分可动态生成 $\bar{\psi}\sigma^{\mu\nu}F_{\mu\nu}\psi$ 形式的有效偶极相互作用。在非相对论极限下，所得运动方程再现了中性费米子的阿哈罗诺夫-卡舍尔哈密顿量。有效磁偶极矩以模型参数表示，并且可以映射到标准模型扩展的费米子扇区的张量系数上。因此，我们的结果提供了四维超对称理论的明确实现，其中阿哈罗诺夫-卡舍尔相互作用动态出现，而超对称性在洛伦兹破坏的情况下保持精确。

title: The Dirac oscillator in the curved spacetime of a cloud of strings
abstract: In this paper, we determine the relativistic bound-state solutions for the Dirac oscillator (DO) in the curved spacetime of a cloud of strings in $(3+1)$-dimensions, where such solutions are given by the four-component normalized Dirac spinor and by the relativistic energy spectrum. However, unlike in literature, here, we work with the spacetime in two different forms/configurations, that is, both in its original form and in its modified form. To achieve our objective, we work with the curved DO in spherical coordinates, where we use the tetrad formalism. So, by defining a stationary ansatz for the spinor, we obtain two coupled first-order differential equations, and by substituting one equation into the other, we obtain a second-order differential equation. To analytically and exactly solve this differential equation, we use a change of function and of variable. From this, we obtain the well-known Whittaker equation, whose solution is the Whittaker function. Consequently, we obtain the energy spectrum, which is quantized in terms of the radial quantum number $n$ and the angular quantum number $\kappa$, and explicitly depends on the angular frequency $\omega$ (describes the DO), curvature parameter $a$ (describes the cloud of strings), and on the effective rest mass $m_{\text{eff}}$ (describes the rest mass modified by the curvature of spacetime). Besides, we graphically analyze the behavior of the spectrum as a function of $\omega$ and $a$ for three different values of $n$ and $\kappa$, as well as the behavior of the radial probability density for four different values of $\kappa$, $\omega$, and $a$ (with $n=0$).
summary:
在本文中，我们确定了 $(3+1)$ 维弦云弯曲时空中狄拉克振子 (DO) 的相对论束缚态解，其中此类解由四分量归一化狄拉克旋量和相对论能谱给出。然而，与文学不同的是，在这里，我们以两种不同的形式/配置来处理时空，即原始形式和修改后的形式。为了实现我们的目标，我们在球坐标中使用弯曲的 DO，并使用四分体形式。因此，通过定义旋量的平稳拟似，我们得到两个耦合的一阶微分方程，并且通过将一个方程代入另一个方程，我们得到一个二阶微分方程。为了解析并精确地求解这个微分方程，我们使用函数和变量的变化。由此，我们得到著名的惠特克方程，其解就是惠特克函数。

因此，我们获得了能量谱，它以径向量子数 $n$ 和角量子数 $\kappa$ 来量化，并且明确取决于角频率 $\omega$（描述 DO）、曲率参数 $a$（描述弦云）和有效静止质量 $m_{\text{eff}}$（描述由时空曲率修改的静止质量）。此外，我们以图形方式分析了对于 $n$ 和 $\kappa$ 的三个不同值，频谱的行为作为 $\omega$ 和 $a$ 的函数，以及 $\kappa$、$\omega$ 和 $a$ 的四个不同值（$n=0$）的径向概率密度的行为。

title: A Monte Carlo Study of the Dipolar Universality Class in Three Dimensions
abstract: The dipolar universality class describes the phase transition in 3D ferromagnets with strong dipolar interactions, as first discussed by Aharony and Fisher in the 1970s. While this universality class has been studied theoretically using renormalization group methods, as well as experimentally, little is known about it from Monte Carlo simulations. In this paper we aim to bridge this gap. We introduce a lattice model that faithfully implements the transverse constraint on the order parameter. We introduce a Markov Chain Monte Carlo algorithm which involves a combination of local Metropolis updates preserving the constraint, and a global update of the zero mode. We perform simulations on cubic lattices up to volume $48\times 48 \times 48$. We observe a continuous phase transition between the disordered and ordered phases. We obtain estimates of universal quantities such as the main critical exponents and the Binder ratio, and compare them with results from other techniques. We also investigate the emergence of rotation invariance at the critical point.
summary: 偶极普遍性类描述了具有强偶极相互作用的 3D 铁磁体中的相变，正如 Aharony 和 Fisher 在 20 世纪 70 年代首次讨论的那样。虽然已经使用重正化群方法从理论上以及实验上研究了这种普适性类别，但从蒙特卡洛模拟中我们对它知之甚少。在本文中，我们旨在弥合这一差距。我们引入了一种晶格模型，它忠实地实现了对阶次参数的横向约束。我们引入了马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗算法，该算法涉及保留约束的局部 Metropolis 更新和零模式的全局更新的组合。我们对体积为 $48\times 48\times 48$ 的立方晶格进行模拟。我们观察到无序相和有序相之间的连续相变。我们获得了通用量的估计，例如主要临界指数和粘合剂比率，并将它们与其他技术的结果进行比较。我们还研究了临界点处旋转不变性的出现。

title: Scaling Solutions of Matter Form Factors in Asymptotically Safe Quantum Gravity
abstract: We investigate the renormalization group flow of a gravity--matter system in which a scalar field is minimally coupled to Einstein gravity and its kinetic term is given by a scale-dependent form factor $f_\Lambda(-\Box)$. Employing the Wilsonian proper-time flow equation, we derive a closed integro-differential equation that encodes the dependence of the form factor on the UV cutoff $\Lambda$. We solve the resulting fixed-point problem with a pseudospectral discretization and find a non-trivial fixed point for which $f_\ast(-\Box)$ departs from the canonical $-\Box$ behavior. Linearizing the flow about this solution yields a discrete spectrum of perturbations and a corresponding set of critical exponents, indicating a non-trivial scaling structure in this non-local sector compatible with asymptotic safety. We also observe that the form factor becomes local once the UV cutoff is removed, suggesting that the bare action associated with this fixed point is local in the scalar two-point sector.
summary: 我们研究重力-物质系统的重整化群流，其中标量场与爱因斯坦引力最小耦合，其动力学项由尺度相关的形状因子 $f_\Lambda(-\Box)$ 给出。利用威尔逊原时流动方程，我们推导出一个封闭的积分微分方程，该方程编码了形状因子对 UV 截止 $\Lambda$ 的依赖性。我们通过伪谱离散化解决了由此产生的定点问题，并找到了一个非平凡的不动点，$f_\ast(-\Box)$ 偏离了规范的 $-\Box$ 行为。对该解的流进行线性化会产生离散的扰动谱和相应的一组临界指数，表明该非局部区域中的非平凡标度结构与渐近安全性兼容。我们还观察到，一旦去除 UV 截止，形状因子就变成局部的，这表明与该固定点相关的裸作用在标量两点扇区中是局部的。

title: Gauge-Dressed Complex Geometry and T-duality in Heterotic String Theories
abstract: We study T-duality of $(p,q)$-hermitian geometries in backgrounds with non-Abelian gauge fields $A$ in heterotic string theories. We introduce a gauge-dressed complex geometry characterized by a shifted metric $\bar{g} = g + \frac{1}{2} \mathrm{Tr}(A^2)$, the closed 2-form $\omega$ and a quasi complex structure satisfying $\bar{J}^2 < 0$, but not necessarily $\bar{J}^2 = -1$. Utilizing the positive and negative chirality half generalized complex-like structures constructed by $(\bar{g}, \bar{J})$, we derive a heterotic Buscher-like rule for geometric quantities. We also demonstrate that the gauge-dressed structures can be used to construct an extended Born geometry that satisfies algebras of hypercomplex numbers.
summary: 我们研究异质弦理论中非阿贝尔规范场 $A$ 背景下 $(p,q)$-埃尔米特几何的 T 对偶性。我们引入了一种规范装饰的复杂几何结构，其特征在于移位度量 $\bar{g} = g + \frac{1}{2} \mathrm{Tr}(A^2)$、封闭的 2-形式 $\omega$ 和满足 $\bar{J}^2 < 0$ 的准复数结构，但不一定 $\bar{J}^2 = -1$。利用 $(\bar{g}, \bar{J})$ 构造的正手性半广义复数结构和负手性半广义复数结构，我们推导出几何量的杂质布歇尔式规则。我们还证明了规范装饰结构可用于构造满足超复数代数的扩展玻恩几何。

title: Thermal and spatial confinement effects in Podolsky electrodynamics
abstract: In this work, Podolsky theory, a second-order, Lorentz- and gauge-invariant extension of classical electrodynamics, is considered. The effects of Podolsky's modification on fundamental phenomena such as the Stefan-Boltzmann law and the Casimir effect for the electromagnetic field are investigated. The Thermo Field Dynamics (TFD) formalism is employed to describe quantum fields at finite temperature and under spatial confinement through its topological structure.
summary: 在这项工作中，考虑了波多尔斯基理论，即经典电动力学的二阶洛伦兹和规范不变扩展。研究了波多尔斯基修正对斯特凡-玻尔兹曼定律和电磁场卡西米尔效应等基本现象的影响。热场动力学（TFD）形式通过其拓扑结构来描述有限温度和空间限制下的量子场。

title: A Runway to Dissipation of Angular Momentum via Worldline Quantum Field Theory
abstract: We extend the worldline quantum field theory formalism to include a direct diagrammatic method of computing the total flux of angular momentum from a black hole scattering event in the post-Minkowskian regime. Remarkably, except for subtle zero-frequency gravitons, the diagrammatic and integrational challenge is in a one-to-one correspondence with the analogous calculation of the black hole impulses -- and the well-developed WQFT methodologies for the impulse may thus be directly imported to this problem. Zero-frequency gravitons appear in this calculation as a "static" integration region in addition to the "dynamical" region usually encountered for the impulse. We show that a large class of static contributions can be organized systematically by introducing $n$-point functions referred to as "static correlators". They reduce to a simple one-loop integral family which we compute explicitly using integration-by-parts relations and the method of differential equations. In passing, our analysis shows that static contributions disappear in space-time dimensions $D>4$. As a concrete application of our new method, we compute explicitly the $\mathcal{O}(G^3)$ total flux of angular momentum reproducing known results. Further, we apply the same method to electromagnetism where we compute the analogous $\mathcal{O}(\alpha^3)$ result.
summary:
我们扩展了世界线量子场论形式主义，包括计算后闵可夫斯基体系中黑洞散射事件的角动量总通量的直接图解方法。值得注意的是，除了微妙的零频率引力子之外，图解和积分挑战与黑洞脉冲的类似计算是一一对应的——因此，成熟的脉冲 WQFT 方法可以直接导入到这个问题中。除了脉冲通常遇到的“动态”区域之外，零频率引力子在此计算中还显示为“静态”积分区域。我们表明，可以通过引入称为“静态相关器”的 $n$ 点函数来系统地组织一大类静态贡献。它们简化为一个简单的单环积分族，我们使用分部积分关系和微分方程方法显式地计算它。顺便说一句，我们的分析表明静态贡献在时空维度 $D>4$ 中消失。

作为我们新方法的具体应用，我们显式计算 $\mathcal{O}(G^3)$ 角动量总通量，再现已知结果。此外，我们将相同的方法应用于电磁学，计算类似的 $\mathcal{O}(\alpha^3)$ 结果。

title: Necessary conditions for causality from linearized stability at ultra-high boosts
abstract: In this work, we provide a novel method to constrain the causal parameter space of a relativistic hydrodynamic system exclusively from its linear stability analysis at non-zero momenta. Our approach exploits the Lorentz-invariant stability property of causal theories. In boosted frames, the dispersion relation exhibits a feature that we call ``$\gamma$-suppression,'' whereby the higher-order terms in the wavenumber expansion are increasingly suppressed beyond leading order at large boosts. As a consequence, at near-luminal values of Lorentz boost, stability criteria at the spatially homogeneous limit are sufficient to identify the region of the parameter space that satisfies the necessary conditions of causality, even at non-zero momenta. After presenting the general hydrodynamic framework, we test the method in conformal Müller-Israel-Stewart theory and show that it provides an efficient way of deriving the necessary conditions of causality while remaining within the low-energy regime of hydrodynamic validity.
summary: 在这项工作中，我们提供了一种新颖的方法来约束相对论流体动力系统的因果参数空间，仅通过其在非零动量下的线性稳定性分析。我们的方法利用了因果理论的洛伦兹不变稳定性。在增强框架中，色散关系表现出我们称之为“$\gamma$-抑制”的特征，即波数展开中的高阶项在大增强下逐渐被抑制到超出前导阶。因此，在洛伦兹增强的近光度值下，空间均匀极限处的稳定性标准足以识别满足因果关系必要条件的参数空间区域，即使在非零动量下也是如此。在提出一般的流体动力学框架之后，我们在共形 Müller-Israel-Stewart 理论中测试了该方法，并表明它提供了一种有效的方法来推导因果关系的必要条件，同时保持在流体动力学有效性的低能量范围内。

title: Classifying double copies and multicopies in AdS
abstract: In this paper, we draw a parallel between solutions of pure three-dimensional gravity with a negative cosmological constant and classical double copies in four dimensions. In the former case, topological solutions, such as the BTZ black hole, deficit angles, and naked singularities, emerge from identifying points in AdS using elements from its isometry algebra $so(2,2)$. The type of solution corresponds one-to-one with the orbits of $so(2,2)$. We demonstrate how various double copies of four-dimensional AdS gravity similarly arise from the $so(2,3)$ isometry elements, which also correspond one-to-one with their orbits through a Penrose-type transform. We classify all such elements and generate the corresponding double copies, which include AdS black holes, black branes, and many others. The double-copy isometries originate from the centralizer of a given AdS isometry, allowing us to define canonical coordinates associated with its Abelian part. Additionally, the two Casimir invariants of $so(2,3)$ feature in the metrics. Our classification naturally extends to higher spins, providing nonequivalent multicopies at the linearized level.
summary: 在本文中，我们将具有负宇宙学常数的纯三维引力解与四维经典双副本进行了比较。在前一种情况下，拓扑解决方案（例如 BTZ 黑洞、赤字角和裸奇点）是使用等距代数 $so(2,2)$ 中的元素识别 AdS 中的点而产生的。解的类型与 $so(2,2)$ 的轨道一一对应。我们演示了四维 AdS 引力的各种双副本如何类似地从 $so(2,3)$ 等距元素产生，这些元素也通过彭罗斯型变换与其轨道一一对应。我们对所有这些元素进行分类并生成相应的双副本，其中包括 AdS 黑洞、黑膜等等。双拷贝等距源于给定 AdS 等距的中心化器，允许我们定义与其阿贝尔部分相关的规范坐标。此外，$so(2,3)$ 的两个卡西米尔不变量也出现在指标中。我们的分类自然扩展到更高的自旋，在线性化水平上提供非等价的多副本。

title: Super-Higher-Form Symmetries
abstract: We review the construction of higher-form symmetries for supersymmetric theories using a supergeometry framework. This reveals an enlarged set of topological conserved supercurrents, including Chern-Weil symmetries and new geometric Chern-Weil symmetries built from invariant supermanifold forms. In N=1 super-Maxwell theory in three dimensions, we construct the corresponding operators and charged defects, with charges determined by a super-linking number between their supporting hypersurfaces. At the end we provide as an original unpublished contribution some hints on how to construct super-symTFT for Chern-Weil and geometric Chern-Weil symmetries directly from supergravity.
summary: 我们回顾了使用超几何框架的超对称理论的更高形式对称性的构造。这揭示了一组扩大的拓扑守恒超流，包括陈-韦尔对称性和从不变超流形形式构建的新几何陈-韦尔对称性。在三维N=1超麦克斯韦理论中，我们构造了相应的算子和带电缺陷，其电荷由它们支撑超曲面之间的超链接数决定。最后，作为未发表的原始贡献，我们提供了一些关于如何直接从超引力构造 Chern-Weil 的 super-symTFT 和几何 Chern-Weil 对称性的提示。

title: On the Consistency of Null Strings Literature: The Tale of an Overlooked Symmetry
abstract: We observe that the null string action possesses a previously overlooked local symmetry. By correctly accounting for this symmetry, we show that the number of physical propagating degrees of freedom of null strings in $D$ dimensional target space is $D-3$, in contrast to $D-2$ that one finds in the literature. Overlooking this symmetry has led to an unphysical over-counting of states, rendering the null string analyses inconsistent. Thus, our observation calls for a thorough revision of all statements and results in the null string literature.
summary: 我们观察到空串动作具有先前被忽视的局部对称性。通过正确考虑这种对称性，我们表明 $D$ 维目标空间中空字符串的物理传播自由度数为 $D-3$，与文献中发现的 $D-2$ 形成鲜明对比。忽视这种对称性会导致状态的非物理过度计数，从而导致空串分析不一致。因此，我们的观察要求对空字符串文献中的所有陈述和结果进行彻底修改。

title: Non-vacuum gravitational effective action
abstract: Curvature expansion for the heat kernel trace and the one-loop effective action is built for the wave operator of the theory in the quasi-thermal setup of a nonvacuum quantum state. This setup implies a non-static and non-stationary Euclidean gravitational background with periodic boundary conditions of the period $\beta=1/T$, where $T$ plays the role of effective global temperature to be locally rescaled by the metric gravitational potential. The results are obtained in the approximation quadratic in metric perturbations on top of flat Euclidean space and covariantized in terms of spacetime curvature. Covariantization includes a special vector field $\xi^\mu(x)$ which generalizes the Killing vector of static geometries with time translation isometry to the case of a generic arbitrarily inhomogeneous metric subject to timelike periodicity condition. This vector field is obtained as a covariant metric functional to quadratic order in metric perturbations and gives rise to the local function $T/\sqrt{\xi^2(x)}$, $\xi^2(x)=g_{\mu\nu}(x)\xi^\mu(x)\xi^\nu(x)$, reducing to Tolman temperature $T/\sqrt{g_{00}(x)}$ on stationary manifolds with Killing symmetry. High ``temperature'' asymptotic behavior of the nonlocal formfactors -- operator coefficients of the curvature tensor structures in the heat kernel and effective action -- are obtained and possible cosmological applications of these results are discussed.
summary:
在非真空量子态的准热设置下，为该理论的波算子建立了热核迹的曲率展开和单环有效作用。这种设置意味着非静态和非静态的欧几里德引力背景，具有 $\beta=1/T$ 周期的周期性边界条件，其中 $T$ 扮演有效全球温度的角色，通过公制引力势进行局部重新调整。结果是在平坦欧几里得空间顶部的度量扰动的近似二次中获得的，并根据时空曲率进行协变。协变化包括一个特殊的向量场 $\xi^\mu(x)$ ，它将具有时间平移等距的静态几何形状的 Killing 向量推广到受类时周期性条件影响的通用任意非齐次度量的情况。该向量场作为度量摄动中二次阶函数的协变度量函数获得，并产生局部函数 $T/\sqrt{\xi^2(x)}$，$\xi^2(x)=g_{\mu\nu}(x)\xi^\mu(x)\xi^\nu(x)$，在固定流形上减少到托尔曼温度 $T/\sqrt{g_{00}(x)}$具有杀死对称性。

获得了非局域形状因子的高温渐近行为（热核中曲率张量结构的算子系数和有效作用），并讨论了这些结果的可能的宇宙学应用。

title: A note on universality in refined Chern-Simons theory
abstract: We discuss various forms of refinements of Vogel's universality in Chern-Simons theory. While the original universality applies to arbitrary simple Lie groups, its counterpart in refined Chyrn-Simons theory is restricted to simply laced Lie groups.
summary: 我们讨论了陈-西蒙斯理论中沃格尔普遍性的各种形式的改进。虽然最初的普遍性适用于任意简单的李群，但其在精炼的 Chyrn-Simons 理论中的对应物仅限于简单的蕾丝李群。

title: Cutting rules in strong field QED with application to trident pair production
abstract: Following Veltman's approach, we formulate and discuss a general cutting equation for QED in a plane-wave background. We apply the corresponding cutting rules to justify the connection between the two-loop radiative corrections to elastic electron scattering and the rate of the trident process in a constant crossed field. As a byproduct, we compare the previously published results for the trident process in a constant crossed field and present a complete analytical expression for direct and exchange contributions to its rate, which is resolved in the spin of the initial electron. Our findings establish that although total rates can be reliably extracted from higher-loop by applying the cutting rules, reconstruction of differential rates requires additional care. The cutting rules apply to any loop order and may be extended to nonperturbative regimes.
summary: 遵循 Veltman 的方法，我们制定并讨论了平面波背景下 QED 的通用切割方程。我们应用相应的切割规则来证明弹性电子散射的双环辐射校正与恒定交叉场中三叉戟过程的速率之间的联系。作为副产品，我们比较了先前发布的恒定交叉场中三叉戟过程的结果，并提出了对其速率的直接和交换贡献的完整分析表达式，该速率在初始电子的自旋中得到解决。我们的研究结果表明，虽然可以通过应用切割规则从更高的循环中可靠地提取总速率，但差异速率的重建需要额外的注意。切割规则适用于任何循环顺序，并且可以扩展到非微扰状态。

title: Anomalies in Neural Network Field Theory
abstract: Neural network field theory (NN-FT) formulates field theory in terms of a network architecture and a density on its parameters. We derive Schwinger--Dyson equations and Ward identities in NN-FT and utilize them to study anomalies. The equations depend on a conserved parameter space current that characterizes symmetries and how they break. It is relevant even in non-local NN-FTs, but can recover local currents in the case of a local Lagrangian by an appropriate fiber-wise average. In machine learning, this formalism is applied to feedforward networks and the attention mechanism. In physics, we use this machinery to study $U(1)$ symmetry for a complex scalar, the scale anomaly in $4d$ massless $\phi^4$ theory, the Weyl anomaly for the bosonic string (including a new computation of the critical dimension), and examples involving discrete topological data, such as winding numbers and T-duality. Since the results are obtained in network parameter space rather than the standard field space, they represent a new way to understand symmetries in quantum field theories.
summary: 神经网络场论（NN-FT）根据网络架构及其参数密度来表述场论。我们推导了 NN-FT 中的 Schwinger-Dyson 方程和 Ward 恒等式，并利用它们来研究异常。这些方程取决于表征对称性及其破缺方式的守恒参数空间电流。即使在非局部 NN-FT 中它也是相关的，但在局部拉格朗日的情况下可以通过适当的光纤平均来恢复局部电流。在机器学习中，这种形式主义应用于前馈网络和注意力机制。在物理学中，我们使用这种机制来研究复标量的 $U(1)$ 对称性、$4d$ 无质量 $\phi^4$ 理论中的尺度异常、玻色弦的 Weyl 异常（包括临界尺寸的新计算），以及涉及离散拓扑数据的示例，例如缠绕数和 T 对偶性。由于结果是在网络参数空间而不是标准场空间中获得的，因此它们代表了理解量子场论中对称性的一种新方法。

title: When Stochasticity Resolves into Certainty: Hidden Structure of Deterministic Motion
abstract: We prove that deterministic motion in dissipative systems emerges as a strict geometric attractor of contact flow, not a statistical approximation. Building on the contact geometry of stochastic vector bundles, we develop time-dependent contact potentials with an exact closure theorem ensuring exact satisfaction of the master equation at any finite order. The Contact Locking Theorem shows that exponential gradient amplification of the probability field is precisely counterbalanced by synchronous stiffness decay, forcing the effective macroscopic-microscopic coupling to vanish exponentially. Deterministic dynamics therefore emerges through deterministic focusing with a universal timescale governed by the drift-field Jacobian spectrum. Validation of the damped-driven Duffing oscillator confirms the predicted rate and exponential convergence.
summary: 我们证明耗散系统中的确定性运动是作为接触流的严格几何吸引子出现的，而不是统计近似。基于随机向量束的接触几何，我们利用精确的闭合定理开发了瞬态接触势，确保在任何有限阶上精确满足主方程。接触锁定定理表明，概率场的指数梯度放大被同步刚度衰减精确地抵消，迫使有效的宏观-微观耦合以指数方式消失。因此，确定性动力学是通过确定性聚焦以及由漂移场雅可比谱控制的通用时间尺度而出现的。阻尼驱动的达芬振荡器的验证证实了预测的速率和指数收敛。

title: A Feynman-Kac Formula for the Subcritical Ultraviolet-Renormalized Spin Boson Model
abstract: We prove a Feynman-Kac formula (FKF) for the self-energy renormalized spin boson Hamiltonian, describing a two-state quantum system linearly coupled to a bosonic quantum field. Similar to recent FKFs for the Fröhlich polaron and the non- and semi-relativistic Nelson models, it yields a probabilistic treatment of the spin as a jump process, but treats the field on the usual bosonic Fock space. As an application, we prove that the existence of ground states for infrared-regular models persists the removal of an ultraviolet cutoff.
summary: 我们证明了自能重整化自旋玻色子哈密顿量的 Feynman-Kac 公式 (FKF)，描述了线性耦合到玻色子量子场的二态量子系统。与最近的 Fröhlich 极化子和非相对论性和半相对论性尼尔森模型的 FKF 类似，它将自旋作为跳跃过程进行概率处理，但在通常的玻色福克空间上处理场。作为一个应用，我们证明了红外规则模型基态的存在持续消除了紫外线截止。

title: A self-adjoint Fourier-type model for the iQuad wavefront sensor
abstract: Advanced adaptive optics (AO) systems can use Fourier-type wavefront sensing to correct optical distortions encountered in ground-based telescopes, AO-assisted retinal imaging, and free-space optical communications (FSOC). Recently, a novel Fourier-type wavefront sensor (WFS) known as the iQuad WFS has been introduced. Its design features a focal plane tessellation with a four-quadrant phase mask (FQPM) that incorporates a $\pm \pi/2$ phase shift between adjacent quadrants. In this work, we establish a comprehensive mathematical framework for the iQuad WFS, including its forward models and linearizations based on the Fréchet derivative. We reveal a connection between the iQuad WFS and the 2d finite Hilbert transform and demonstrate that the linear iQuad WFS operator is self-adjoint - a unique property among Fourier-type WFSs. Additionally, we introduce the double iQuad WFS, a two-path configuration that combines two rotated iQuad WFSs. This design addresses the limitations of the single iQuad WFS by suppressing poorly-seen phase components. Moreover, the double setup simplifies the mathematical modeling. We also highlight iQuad similarities to the widely used pyramid wavefront sensor (PWFS). Finally, we extend the concept of modulation to the iQuad WFS, further enhancing its versatility. The theoretical analysis presented here lays the groundwork for the development of fast and robust model-based wavefront reconstruction algorithms for the iQuad WFS, paving the way for future applications in AO instruments.
summary:
先进的自适应光学 (AO) 系统可以使用傅立叶型波前传感来校正地面望远镜、AO 辅助视网膜成像和自由空间光通信 (FSOC) 中遇到的光学畸变。最近，推出了一种新型傅立叶型波前传感器 (WFS)，称为 iQuad WFS。其设计采用焦平面镶嵌和四象限相位掩模 (FQPM)，其中包含相邻象限之间的 $\pm \pi/2$ 相移。在这项工作中，我们为 iQuad WFS 建立了一个全面的数学框架，包括其前向模型和基于 Fréchet 导数的线性化。我们揭示了 iQuad WFS 和二维有限希尔伯特变换之间的联系，并证明线性 iQuad WFS 算子是自伴的——这是傅里叶型 WFS 中的独特属性。此外，我们还引入了双 iQuad WFS，这是一种结合了两个旋转 iQuad WFS 的双路径配置。该设计通过抑制难以看到的相位分量来解决单个 iQuad WFS 的局限性。此外，双重设置简化了数学建模。

我们还强调 iQuad 与广泛使用的金字塔波前传感器 (PWFS) 的相似之处。最后，我们将调制的概念扩展到 iQuad WFS，进一步增强其多功能性。这里介绍的理论分析为 iQuad WFS 开发快速、稳健的基于模型的波前重建算法奠定了基础，为 AO 仪器的未来应用铺平了道路。

title: Local Topological Quantum Order and Spectral Gap Stability for the AKLT Models on the Hexagonal and Lieb Lattices
abstract: We prove that the ground state of the AKLT models on the hexagonal lattice and the Lieb lattice satisfy the local topological quantum order (LTQO) condition. This will be a consequence of proving that the finite volume ground states are indistinguishable from a unique infinite volume ground state. Concretely, we identify a sequence of increasing and absorbing finite volumes for which any finite volume ground state expectation is well approximated by the infinite volume state with error decaying at a uniform exponential rate in the distance between the support of the observable and boundary of the finite volume. As a corollary to the LTQO property, we obtain that the spectral gap above the ground state in these models is stable under general small perturbations of sufficient decay. We prove these results by a detailed analysis of the polymer representation of the ground states state derived by Kennedy, Lieb and Tasaki (1988) with the necessary modifications required for proving the strong form of ground state indistinguishability needed for LTQO.
summary: 我们证明了六方晶格和 Lieb 晶格上的 AKLT 模型的基态满足局域拓扑量子级 (LTQO) 条件。这将是证明有限体积基态与唯一的无限体积基态无法区分的结果。具体来说，我们确定了一系列递增和吸收的有限体积，其中任何有限体积基态期望都可以很好地近似为无限体积状态，并且误差在可观察到的支持与有限体积边界之间的距离上以均匀指数速率衰减。作为 LTQO 属性的推论，我们得出这些模型中基态以上的光谱间隙在足够衰减的一般小扰动下是稳定的。我们通过对 Kennedy、Lieb 和 Tasaki (1988) 导出的基态聚合物表示进行详细分析来证明这些结果，并进行了必要的修改，以证明 LTQO 所需的强基态不可区分性形式。

title: Quasi-Sierpinski Structure for Uniform Load Distribution
abstract: Land reclamation methods, indispensable for the proper development of modern coastal cities, are ecologically destructive. We present a fractal structure, similar to a Sierpinski triangle, which solves this problem by resting directly on the seabed thanks to the uniform load distribution we achieve on its base. To obtain this uniform distribution, we show that the supports of the structure must displace vertically following any function of the Takagi class. This causes the vertical deformations of the structure to follow this same class and the horizontal deformations to be related to the Cantor function. The structure works with an unlimited number of combinations of areas of its elements and materials, which gives designers a high degree of constructive flexibility.
summary: 现代沿海城市的正常发展所必需的填海造地方法具有生态破坏性。我们提出了一种类似于谢尔宾斯基三角形的分形结构，由于我们在其基础上实现了均匀的载荷分布，它通过直接放置在海底来解决这个问题。为了获得这种均匀分布，我们表明结构的支撑必须遵循高木类的任何函数垂直位移。这导致结构的垂直变形遵循同一类别，并且水平变形与康托函数相关。该结构可对其元素和材料区域进行无限数量的组合，这为设计师提供了高度的构造灵活性。

title: An analytical approach to calculating stationary PDFs for reflected random walks with an application to BESS-based ramp-rate control
abstract: A Wiener-Hopf-type integral equation for the stationary PDF of a reflected random walk is derived rigorously based on modern probability theory, and an application to battery energy storage systems (BESS), specifically the sizing of the inverter, is discussed in depth. The methodological steps include the construction of a Markov kernel, the derivation of a Fredholm integral equation of the second kind for the PDF of the BESS power, and an analytical solution of the equation based on a Neumann series. The analytical results were compared against numerical solutions obtained with the Nystrom method, as well as against the results of an algorithmic simulation using simulated input time series. The use of truncated versions of the analytic solution allows for the construction of simplified design rules for the power systems practitioner. General insights into inverter sizing criteria of storage systems for ramp-rate control of variable renewable energy (VRE) sources such as wind and solar are provided.
summary: 基于现代概率论严格推导出反射随机游走的平稳 PDF 的 Wiener-Hopf 型积分方程，并深入讨论了在电池储能系统 (BESS) 中的应用，特别是逆变器的尺寸。方法步骤包括构造马尔可夫核、推导 BESS 功率 PDF 的第二类 Fredholm 积分方程以及基于 Neumann 级数的方程的解析解。将分析结果与用 Nystrom 方法获得的数值解以及使用模拟输入时间序列的算法模拟的结果进行比较。使用解析解的截断版本可以为电力系统从业者构建简化的设计规则。提供了对风能和太阳能等可变可再生能源 (VRE) 爬坡率控制的存储系统逆变器尺寸标准的一般见解。

title: Large $N$ factorization of families of tensor trace-invariants
abstract: It was recently proven that, in contrast to their matrix analogues, the moments of a real Gaussian tensor of size N do not in general factorize over their connected components in the asymptotic large N limit. While the original proof of this rather surprising result was not constructive, explicit examples of non-factorizing moments, which are expectation values of trace-invariants, have since then been discovered. We explore further aspects of this problem, with a focus on Haar-distributed (or Gaussian) complex random tensors, which are more directly relevant to quantum information. We start out by exhibiting an explicit example of non-factorizing trace-invariant, thereby filling a gap in the recent literature. We then turn to the opposite question: that of finding interesting families of trace-invariants that do in fact factorize at large N. We establish three main theorems in this regard. The first one provides a sufficient combinatorial bound ensuring large N factorization, that is also simple enough to be applicable to various cases of practical relevance. Our second main result shows that the expectation value of any compatible trace-invariant is dominated by certain tree-like combinatorial structures at large N, which we refer to as tree-like dominant pairings. Our third main theorem establishes that any trace-invariant admitting tree-like dominant pairings does actually factorize at large N. In this way, we are able to prove that various families of trace-invariants that have been previously studied in the literature do factorize at large N. We apply our findings to the theory of multipartite quantum entanglement: to any trace-invariant is associated a multipartite generalization of Rényi entanglement entropy, whose typical expectation value in the uniform random quantum state can be explicitly computed assuming large N factorization.
summary:
最近证明，与它们的矩阵类似物相比，大小为 N 的实高斯张量的矩通常不会在渐近大 N 极限中分解它们的连通分量。虽然这个相当令人惊讶的结果的原始证明不是建设性的，但从那时起就发现了非因式分解矩（即迹不变量的期望值）的明确例子。我们进一步探讨了这个问题，重点是哈尔分布（或高斯）复杂随机张量，它们与量子信息更直接相关。我们首先展示非因式分解迹不变性的明确示例，从而填补了最近文献中的空白。然后我们转向相反的问题：寻找实际上在大 N 上因式分解的有趣的迹不变量族。我们在这方面建立了三个主要定理。第一个提供了足够的组合界限，确保大的 N 分解，这也足够简单，可以适用于实际相关的各种情况。

我们的第二个主要结果表明，任何兼容的迹不变式的期望值都由大 N 处的某些树状组合结构主导，我们将其称为树状显性配对。我们的第三个主要定理确立了任何痕量不变式承认树状显性配对实际上确实在大 N 处进行因式分解。通过这种方式，我们能够证明之前在文献中研究过的各种迹不变量族确实在大 N 处进行因式分解。我们将我们的发现应用于多部分量子纠缠理论：任何迹不变量都与 Rényi 纠缠熵的多部分推广相关联，其典型期望值在均匀分布中假设大 N 分解，可以显式计算随机量子态。

title: End-to-End Neural and Quantum Transcoding for Compressed Latent Representation under Channel Noise
abstract: Recent advancements in quantum computing highlight the need for efficient encoding of classical data into quantum states to ensure robust quantum information processing. Traditional encoding schemes often impose impractical requirements about the knowledge of quantum states and lack adaptability to noisy quantum channels and broader tasks. To address these limitations, we propose a novel end-to-end learnable quantum transcoding scheme explicitly optimized for compactness and robustness in noisy quantum communication scenarios. Our approach integrates neural network-based data compression with Cholesky decomposition-based quantum encoding and bypasses full density matrix reconstruction. Through normalized quantum observables, our method enables efficient tomography and achieves high reconstruction and classification performance even under extreme noise conditions.

title: Testing Catability and Coherent Superposition of $2\mathcal{D}$ Graphene via Lie Algebra
abstract: We develop a theoretical framework for describing superposed coherent states in graphene quantum systems using the concept of catability as a phase-sensitive metric functional measure. In this case, the formalism quantifies interference stability and coherence structure via phase-dependent contributions of quantum superposition states. Catability is defined as a functional measure sensitive to relative phase variations within coherent state combinations, serving as a diagnostic tool for quantum interference effects in graphene-based systems. Also, the formulation is extended using Lie algebra techniques, where the underlying symmetry structure of graphene quantum states is represented through operator algebras governing state transformations in quantum space. In this context, to describe nonlocal propagation and phase-resolved dynamics, a Green function approach is incorporated, enabling systematic treatment of quantum correlations in a spatially extended structures framework. A unified framework is constructed by combining Lie algebraic symmetry analysis with Green function propagation theory, yielding a consistent description of phase-sensitive catability in complex graphene quantum configurations within the framework approach. Results provide a structured route for testing coherence, interference stability, and quantum state control in low-dimensional quantum materials systems.

title: Counting anticommuting Pauli pairs in linear time
abstract: Many quantum computing workflows manipulate long lists of Pauli strings. A basic classical subroutine involves taking $m$ Pauli strings on $n$ qubits, each of weight bounded by a constant, to determine if they are pairwise commuting, identify any counterexamples, or calculate the exact number of anticommuting unordered pairs. The standard general-purpose route represents Pauli strings in binary symplectic form and checks pairs in $O(m^2)$ time. Here, we provide an $O(m)$ algorithm for the bounded locality regime. It maintains counts of all labeled subpatterns of previously inserted strings and answers each new string query by a subset zeta identity. Our algorithm is particularly useful for processing large collections of Pauli strings within the bounded locality regime.
summary: 许多量子计算工作流程都会处理长长的泡利弦列表。一个基本的经典子例程涉及在 $n$ 个量子位上获取 $m$ 泡利字符串，每个权重由一个常数界定，以确定它们是否成对交换，识别任何反例，或计算反交换无序对的确切数量。标准通用路由以二进制辛形式表示泡利字符串，并在 $O(m^2)$ 时间内检查对。在这里，我们为有界局部性机制提供了一个 $O(m)$ 算法。它维护先前插入字符串的所有标记子模式的计数，并通过子集 zeta 身份回答每个新字符串查询。我们的算法对于处理有界局部性机制内的大量泡利字符串集合特别有用。

title: Midpoint BKM Estimates and Boundary Coherence
abstract: We study lower bounds for the quantum relative entropy between a density matrix and its block-diagonal part. For a block matrix with diagonal blocks A,C>0 and off-diagonal coherence block B, we prove a lower bound expressed through the associated Bogoliubov--Kubo--Mori (BKM) kernel. The proof uses a midpoint estimate for the BKM Hessian along the affine interpolation between the matrix and its block-diagonal projection. The resulting estimate is genuinely noncommutative and retains information about the joint spectral structure of the diagonal blocks and the coherence term. As a consequence, under a spectral gap condition on A relative to C, we obtain an explicit logarithmic lower bound proportional to the squared Frobenius norm of the coherence block. The appearance of the BKM metric is natural in this setting because it coincides with the Hessian of quantum relative entropy.
summary: 我们研究密度矩阵与其块对角线部分之间的量子相对熵的下界。 For a block matrix with diagonal blocks A,C>0 and off-diagonal coherence block B, we prove a lower bound expressed through the associated Bogoliubov--Kubo--Mori (BKM) kernel.该证明使用 BKM Hessian 矩阵及其块对角投影之间的仿射插值的中点估计。 The resulting estimate is genuinely noncommutative and retains information about the joint spectral structure of the diagonal blocks and the coherence term. As a consequence, under a spectral gap condition on A relative to C, we obtain an explicit logarithmic lower bound proportional to the squared Frobenius norm of the coherence block. BKM 度量的出现在这种情况下是很自然的，因为它与量子相对熵的 Hessian 矩阵一致。

title: Exact Nilpotent Collapse of Born-Neumann Expansions in Finite Quantum Systems: A SON Formulation for Exact Algebraic Closures of Scattering Series
abstract: We identify a class of finite quantum systems, namely, acyclic systems whose transition graph is a directed acyclic graph (DAG), for which the Born series collapses into an exact algebraic identity with finitely many terms and strictly zero truncation error. The sufficient condition is the nilpotency of the transfer operator T = G_0(E)V. If T^{m+1} = 0, then the exact solution of the Lippmann-Schwinger equation is the finite sum |psi> = sum_{k=0}^{m} T^k |phi>, with no condition on ||T||. We prove that the acyclicity of the transition graph implies the nilpotency of T (Theorem 19), and that the nilpotency index coincides with the maximal path length of the graph (Proposition 21). The main result (Theorem 23) concerns the four-level quantum system with diamond-graph structure. In this case, the transition amplitude toward the final state is A_4 = t_{42}t_{21} + t_{43}t_{31}, an exact algebraic identity encoding constructive interference, exact destructive interference (dark state formation), and partial interference. The first-order Born approximation predicts identically zero amplitude in all regimes, thereby failing quantitatively in 100% of the cases. The Born-SON framework additionally provides the exact full resolvent, the exact T-matrix, explicit error control in the quasi-nilpotent regime, and a scalar structural metric, the Born-SON depth, quantifying the intrinsic complexity of an acyclic quantum system.
summary:
我们识别了一类有限量子系统，即无环系统，其转移图是有向无环图（DAG），其玻恩级数塌陷为具有有限多项和严格零截断误差的精确代数恒等式。充分条件是传递算子 T = G_0(E)V 的幂零性。如果 T^{m+1} = 0，则 Lippmann-Schwinger 方程的精确解为有限和 |psi> = sum_{k=0}^{m} T^k |phi>，且对 ||T|| 没有任何条件。我们证明了转移图的无环性意味着 T 的幂幂性（定理 19），并且幂幂指数与图的最大路径长度一致（命题 21）。主要结果（定理 23）涉及具有菱形图结构的四能级量子系统。在这种情况下，向最终状态的转变幅度为 A_4 = t_{42}t_{21} + t_{43}t_{31}，精确代数恒等式编码相长干涉、精确相消干涉（暗态形成）和部分干涉。一阶玻恩近似在所有情况下都预测相同的零振幅，因此在 100% 的情况下定量失败。

Born-SON 框架还提供精确的完整解析、精确的 T 矩阵、准幂零区域中的显式误差控制以及标量结构度量（Born-SON 深度），量化非循环量子系统的内在复杂性。

title: Quantum Fanout Gates in Constant Depth via Resonance Engineering
abstract: We present a novel implementation of an n-qubit fanout gate using resonance engineering. Our proposed mechanism uses Jaynes-Cummings interactions between multiple qubits and a common harmonic oscillator to realize a fanout gate at the system-level. Our theoretical analysis establishes upper bounds on the gate error, demonstrating linear infidelity scaling in constant time -- a favorable trade-off compared to a conventional CNOT decomposition. To validate the performance of our scheme at large system sizes, we exploit permutation symmetry to reduce the simulation complexity from exponential to polynomial in the number of qubits, enabling simulation up to 100 qubits. The results of this numerical analysis are consistent with our theoretical findings and allow us to characterize the performance well. Our gate will enable faster stabilizer readouts and could provide polynomial speedups in many quantum algorithms.
summary: 我们提出了一种使用共振工程的 n 量子位扇出门的新颖实现。 Our proposed mechanism uses Jaynes-Cummings interactions between multiple qubits and a common harmonic oscillator to realize a fanout gate at the system-level. Our theoretical analysis establishes upper bounds on the gate error, demonstrating linear infidelity scaling in constant time -- a favorable trade-off compared to a conventional CNOT decomposition. To validate the performance of our scheme at large system sizes, we exploit permutation symmetry to reduce the simulation complexity from exponential to polynomial in the number of qubits, enabling simulation up to 100 qubits.该数值分析的结果与我们的理论发现一致，使我们能够很好地表征性能。我们的门将实现更快的稳定器读数，并可以在许多量子算法中提供多项式加速。

title: Graph-State Circuit Blocks control Entanglement and Scrambling Velocities
abstract: Random circuit models often describe local dynamics using generic two-qubit gates, which have proven successful in capturing entanglement growth and operator spreading in many contexts. This approach naturally leads to the expectation that detailed gate structure plays only a limited role in coarse-grained entanglement and scrambling diagnostics. We show that the internal structure of multipartite circuit primitives can significantly influence these dynamical rates, even within a fixed random-circuit architecture. To investigate this, we study an exactly simulable family of Clifford quantum circuits built from fixed $n$-qubit graph-state preparation unitaries, which we treat as elementary building blocks. Specifically, we consider a one-dimensional chain of $N$ qubits initialized in a product state and evolved by layers in which nonoverlapping length-$n$ blocks are placed at uniformly random positions with sparsity $\alpha$. We find that different choices of graph-state building blocks lead to strongly varying dynamical rates. Graph states that are inequivalent under local Clifford (LC) transformations generate sharply different entanglement velocities $v_E$ and butterfly velocities $v_B$, even though the circuits are drawn from the same ensemble with identical architecture and randomness parameters. We further show that this hierarchy is captured by two complementary block-level characteristics: the distribution of entanglement across internal bipartitions of the graph state, which correlates with $v_E$, and a graph-theoretic connectivity profile across bipartitions, which correlates with $v_B$. Neither descriptor alone fully determines the dynamics; rather, entanglement growth and operator spreading are controlled by distinct structural features of the local circuit blocks. Notably, AME states appear among the fastest scrambling building blocks within the ensembles studied here.
summary:
随机电路模型通常使用通用的双量子位门来描述局部动态，事实证明，这种模型在许多情况下可以成功捕获纠缠增长和算子扩散。这种方法自然会导致这样的预期：详细的门结构在粗粒度纠缠和加扰诊断中仅发挥有限的作用。我们表明，即使在固定的随机电路架构中，多部分电路原语的内部结构也可以显着影响这些动态速率。为了研究这个问题，我们研究了一个完全可模拟的 Clifford 量子电路系列，它由固定的 $n$ 量子位图状态准备酉构成，我们将其视为基本构建块。具体来说，我们考虑一个由 $N$ 量子位组成的一维链，该链在乘积状态下初始化，并通过层演化，其中不重叠的长度 $n$ 块被放置在稀疏性 $\alpha$ 的均匀随机位置。 We find that different choices of graph-state building blocks lead to strongly varying dynamical rates.

即使电路是从具有相同架构和随机性参数的相同系综中绘制的，在局部 Clifford (LC) 变换下不等价的图状态会生成截然不同的纠缠速度 $v_E$ 和蝴蝶速度 $v_B$。我们进一步表明，这种层次结构是由两个互补的块级特征捕获的：图状态内部二分区之间的纠缠分布（与 $v_E$ 相关），以及二分区之间的图论连接配置文件（与 $v_B$ 相关）。单独的描述符都不能完全确定动态。相反，纠缠增长和算子扩散是由局部电路块的独特结构特征控制的。值得注意的是，AME 状态似乎是此处研究的整体中最快的无序构建块之一。

title: Distributed estimation of many-body Hamiltonians via punctured surface code
abstract: We study how a punctured surface code can turn many local $Z$-type couplings into one protected logical signal for distributed quantum metrology, where the goal is to estimate a weighted average of the coupling strengths. We consider an ordinary planar patch with two $X$-cut holes and provide a distributed sensing protocol where all $Z$-type couplings correspond to the same nontrivial logical $\bar{Z}$ for the punctured surface code. When the couplings are disjoint, we show that the relevant global condition is equivalent to the existence of a closed dual loop, called a witness, that has an odd number of intersections with every chain. Together with a local clean opening condition, this witness criterion gives a concrete punctured-code construction in which all signal chains implement the same nontrivial logical $\bar Z$. For three-body interactions with overlapping supports, we also identify the class of interactions where our punctured surface code protocol applies. Overall, our results provide a novel, noise-robust distributed sensing protocol for many-body interactions, with corresponding topological design criteria.
summary: 我们研究了穿孔表面代码如何将许多局部 $Z$ 型耦合转换为一个受保护的逻辑信号，用于分布式量子计量，其目标是估计耦合强度的加权平均值。我们考虑具有两个 $X$ 切孔的普通平面贴片，并提供分布式传感协议，其中所有 $Z$ 型耦合对应于穿孔表面代码的相同非平凡逻辑 $\bar{Z}$。当耦合不相交时，我们表明相关的全局条件相当于存在一个闭合的双环，称为见证，它与每条链都有奇数个交叉点。与局部干净开放条件一起，该见证标准给出了具体的穿孔代码构造，其中所有信号链都实现相同的非平凡逻辑 $\bar Z$。对于具有重叠支撑的三体交互，我们还确定了穿孔表面代码协议适用的交互类别。总的来说，我们的结果为多体交互提供了一种新颖的、抗噪声的分布式传感协议，并具有相应的拓扑设计标准。

title: Permutation-symmetric quantum trajectories
abstract: We show how one may perform a stochastic unraveling which respects weak permutation symmetry for models of $N$ emitters coupled to a common system (e.g. a cavity mode). For problems involving 2-level emitters, such an unravelling reduces the computational cost from $\mathcal{O}(N^5)$ to $\mathcal{O}(N^2)$, and with additional refinements, allows reduction to $\mathcal{O}(N)$. This significantly increases the range of system sizes for which one can model exact quantum dynamics of such systems. We further show how the method can also be applied to d-level systems, with computational effort scaling as $\mathcal{O}(N^{d(d-1)/2})$, and we show it allows large-N simulations for d=3.
summary: 我们展示了如何执行随机分解，该分解尊重耦合到公共系统（例如腔模式）的 $N$ 发射器模型的弱排列对称性。对于涉及 2 级发射器的问题，这种分解将计算成本从 $\mathcal{O}(N^5)$ 降低到 $\mathcal{O}(N^2)$，并且通过额外的改进，可以减少到 $\mathcal{O}(N)$。这显着增加了系统尺寸的范围，可以对此类系统的精确量子动力学进行建模。我们进一步展示了如何将该方法应用于 d 级系统，计算量缩放为 $\mathcal{O}(N^{d(d-1)/2})$，并且我们展示了它允许 d=3 的大 N 模拟。

title: Lecture Notes on Replica Tensor Networks for Random Quantum Circuits
abstract: We present a pedagogical, hands-on tutorial on \emph{replica tensor-network} techniques for random quantum circuits. At its core, the method recasts circuit-averaged observables acting on multiple copies of the system as the contraction of a classical tensor network, equivalently the partition function of a statistical-mechanics model whose effective spins live in the commutant of the gate ensemble. The framework is general: changing the observable or the initial state modifies only the replica boundary conditions, while changing the ensemble modifies the bulk tensors. Focusing on quantum-information diagnostics, from metrics of wavefunction spreadings to entanglement quantifiers, we illustrate the approach in both clean and noisy random unitary circuits. We then briefly explain how the methodology extends to other ensembles, such as orthogonal or Clifford circuits. The lecture notes are accompanied by \texttt{ReplicaTN}, a self-contained C++/Python library and pedagogical notebooks.
summary: 我们提供了一个关于随机量子电路的\emph{复制张量网络}技术的教学实践教程。该方法的核心是将作用于系统多个副本的电路平均可观测量重新定义为经典张量网络的收缩，相当于统计力学模型的配分函数，其有效自旋存在于门系综的交换子中。该框架是通用的：更改可观测值或初始状态仅修改副本边界条件，而更改系综会修改体张量。专注于量子信息诊断，从波函数扩展度量到纠缠量词，我们在干净和噪声随机酉电路中说明了该方法。然后，我们简要解释该方法如何扩展到其他系综，例如正交或 Clifford 电路。讲义附有 \texttt{ReplicaTN}、一个独立的 C++/Python 库和教学笔记本。

title: The Quantum Hamiltonian Analysis Toolkit: Lowering the Barrier to Quantum Computing with Hamiltonians
abstract: We present the Quantum Hamiltonian Analysis Toolkit (QHAT), a newly developed application that provides a user-friendly interface for studying Hamiltonians and performing Hamiltonian simulation on fault-tolerant quantum computers. QHAT enables the generation and analysis of Hamiltonians through a powerful and feature-rich application, driven by simple inputs designed to reflect user needs rather than algorithmic details, so that productive research on your application of interest can be done without needing a deep understanding of quantum computing algorithms. QHAT enables a streamlined workflow to analyze Hamiltonians and Hamiltonian simulation, supporting multiple choices of algorithms and analyses. It supports Hamiltonians from multiple sources but can also generate Hamiltonians based on a simple description of the system, saving intermediate data files for re-use when generating related Hamiltonians. Deriving the parameters for quantum computing algorithms can be a challenge, so QHAT is built around user-facing concepts such as maximum allowable error, rather than being built around algorithmic details such as steps counts or order parameters. An emphasis on user-friendly interfaces and efficient analysis means that the barrier to entry is low while rapidly providing results useful for a broad scope of studies.
summary:
我们推出了量子哈密顿量分析工具包（QHAT），这是一个新开发的应用程序，它提供了一个用户友好的界面，用于研究哈密顿量并在容错量子计算机上执行哈密顿量模拟。 QHAT 通过强大且功能丰富的应用程序实现哈密顿量的生成和分析，该应用程序由旨在反映用户需求而不是算法细节的简单输入驱动，因此无需深入了解量子计算算法，即可对您感兴趣的应用程序进行富有成效的研究。 QHAT 支持简化的工作流程来分析哈密顿量和哈密顿模拟，支持算法和分析的多种选择。它支持来自多个来源的哈密顿量，但也可以根据系统的简单描述生成哈密顿量，保存中间数据文件以便在生成相关哈密顿量时重复使用。导出量子计算算法的参数可能是一个挑战，因此 QHAT 是围绕面向用户的概念（例如最大允许误差）构建的，而不是围绕算法细节（例如步数或顺序参数）构建的。

强调用户友好的界面和高效的分析意味着进入门槛较低，同时快速提供对广泛研究有用的结果。

title: Quantum Parity Representations: Learnable Basis Discovery, Encoders, and Shadow Deployment
abstract: We study parity features as representations that can be evaluated entirely classically once the binary or quantized input representation and parity words are fixed, particularly when labels depend on higher-order feature interactions or when discrete inference interfaces support perturbation robustness. A parity feature is a signed product over selected bits of a binary input: once the participating bits are known, evaluation requires no quantum resources. Reaching a useful parity representation requires solving two challenges. When the input is parity-ready (a meaningful binary string), the challenge is basis discovery: selecting useful parity words from a combinatorial search space. Otherwise, the challenge is encoding: constructing a binary vector on which parity computation is meaningful. We use hybrid quantum-classical training pipelines to address these: learnable Pauli word selection for basis discovery, learned projection encodings for continuous embeddings, and sPQC-Parity for discrete inputs. On three native-binary parity tasks with 5-10 qubits, the learned parity basis improves mean accuracy by 23.9% to 41.7% over logistic-regression and support-vector baselines. A model comparison shows that the improvement comes primarily from discovering the right parity basis, rather than from quantum moment computation at inference. On five continuous text benchmarks, learned projection recovers much of the loss introduced by dimensionality reduction and fixed binarization, exceeding the full continuous baseline on CR, SST-2, and SST-5. On three encoding-limited discrete datasets, when compared with PCA-bin as the baseline, sPQC-Parity reaches 94.6% improvement on mushroom, 3.0% on splice, and matches PCA-bin on promoter. We also analyze inference robustness under binary or quantized inference, where rounding gives exact invariance below half the quantization step.
summary:
我们研究奇偶特征作为表示，一旦二进制或量化输入表示和奇偶校验字固定，就可以完全经典地评估，特别是当标签依赖于高阶特征交互或离散推理接口支持扰动鲁棒性时。奇偶校验功能是二进制输入的选定位的带符号乘积：一旦已知参与位，评估就不需要量子资源。达到有用的奇偶校验表示需要解决两个挑战。当输入准备好奇偶校验（有意义的二进制字符串）时，挑战是基础发现：从组合搜索空间中选择有用的奇偶校验字。否则，挑战在于编码：构造一个二进制向量，在该向量上进行奇偶校验计算是有意义的。我们使用混合量子经典训练管道来解决这些问题：用于基础发现的可学习泡利词选择、用于连续嵌入的学习投影编码以及用于离散输入的 sPQC-Parity。在具有 5-10 个量子位的三个本机二进制奇偶校验任务中，学习奇偶校验基础将平均准确度比逻辑回归和支持向量基线提高了 23.9% 至 41.7%。

模型比较表明，改进主要来自于发现正确的奇偶基础，而不是来自推理时的量子矩计算。在五个连续文本基准上，学习投影恢复了降维和固定二值化带来的大部分损失，超过了 CR、SST-2 和 SST-5 上的完整连续基线。在三个编码受限的离散数据集上，与作为基线的 PCA-bin 相比，sPQC-Parity 对蘑菇的改进达到 94.6%，对剪接的改进达到 3.0%，并且与启动子上的 PCA-bin 匹配。我们还分析了二进制或量化推理下的推理鲁棒性，其中舍入给出了低于一半量化步长的精确不变性。

title: Quantum tunneling, global phases and the limits of classical action reconstructions
abstract: It was proposed recently that the Schrödinger wave function can be reconstructed exactly from a discrete superposition of classical action branches weighted by associated classical densities, without semiclassical approximations. We examine this construction for quantum tunneling through finite potential barriers and for quantum phase phenomena. Although formally consistent when the Hamilton-Jacobi equation admits globally defined real branches, the construction breaks down in classically forbidden regions where no real classical action exists. Using rectangular and Coulomb barrier tunneling in alpha decay and nuclear fusion, we show that the wave function requires either a non-vanishing quantum potential or complex-valued action. The growing barrier component fixed by global boundary conditions is essential for transmission and cannot arise from local real classical trajectories alone. Berry phase, flux quantization, Josephson tunneling, and dc SQUID interference likewise impose global phase constraints absent from local classical action transport.
summary: 最近有人提出，薛定谔波函数可以根据相关经典密度加权的经典作用分支的离散叠加来精确重建，而无需半经典近似。我们研究了这种通过有限势垒的量子隧道效应和量子相现象的结构。尽管当哈密尔顿-雅可比方程承认全局定义的实分支时，该结构在形式上是一致的，但在不存在真正的经典作用的经典禁区中，该构造会崩溃。使用α衰变和核聚变中的矩形和库仑势垒隧道效应，我们表明波函数需要不消失的量子势或复值作用。由全局边界条件固定的不断增长的势垒分量对于传输至关重要，并且不能仅由局部真实经典轨迹产生。贝里相位、通量量化、约瑟夫森隧道效应和直流 SQUID 干扰同样会施加局部经典作用传输中不存在的全局相位约束。

title: Analogue quantum simulation with polylogarithmic interaction strengths by extrapolating within phases of matter
abstract: Simple families of quantum Hamiltonians can simulate general many-body systems at arbitrary precision through the use of perturbative gadgets, however this generally requires interaction strengths spanning many orders of magnitude which scale polynomially in the system size and inverse precision, resulting in physically unrealisable systems. In this work, we show that for non-critical systems these required scalings can be exponentially reduced through classical post-processing, by simulating the model at smaller energy scales and extrapolating observables to the perturbative limit. In particular, we show that both local and extensive properties of thermal states with exponentially decaying correlations and ground states with a sufficiently stable gap can be simulated using gadgets whose interaction strengths scale only polylogarithmically in the inverse precision and the system size. As a key tool, we develop a generalised treatment of the local Schrieffer-Wolff transformation for geometrically quasi-local Hamiltonians over many energy scales, facilitating the analysis of perturbative gadget Hamiltonians without extensive global energy penalities, which may be of independent interest.
summary:
简单的量子哈密顿族可以通过使用微扰装置以任意精度模拟一般的多体系统，但这通常需要跨越多个数量级的相互作用强度，这些相互作用强度在系统大小和逆精度上按多项式缩放，从而导致物理上无法实现的系统。在这项工作中，我们表明，对于非关键系统，通过经典的后处理，通过在较小的能量尺度上模拟模型并将可观测量外推到扰动极限，可以以指数方式减少这些所需的缩放。特别是，我们表明，具有指数衰减相关性的热态和具有足够稳定间隙的基态的局部和广泛特性都可以使用小工具进行模拟，这些小工具的相互作用强度仅在逆精度和系统尺寸上呈多对数缩放。

作为一个关键工具，我们开发了一种对许多能量尺度上的几何准局部哈密顿量的局部施里弗-沃尔夫变换的广义处理，促进了微扰小工具哈密顿量的分析，而没有广泛的全局能量惩罚，这可能是独立的兴趣。

title: TuniQ: Autotuning Compilation Passes for Quantum Workloads at Scale for Effectiveness and Efficiency
abstract: Quantum processors are being integrated into HPC ecosystems as co-processors, where compilation of quantum circuits into hardware-executable form determines both output fidelity and runtime. Current compilers use a fixed pass sequence and ignore the fact that optimal pass selection varies with circuit, hardware, and noise conditions. We present TuniQ, a reinforcement learning-based system that selects compilation passes at each pipeline stage, adapting to circuit, backend, and current noise profile. TuniQ introduces several novel design components like a dual-encoder for stage-aware representation, shaped rewards for cross-stage credit assignment, and dynamic action masking for valid compilation. Evaluated across diverse quantum workloads on multiple IBM Quantum Cloud processors, TuniQ improves fidelity and reduces compilation time over the state-of-the-art IBM Qiskit transpiler, generalizes across backends without retraining, and scales strongly to utility-scale circuits with growing advantage.
summary: 量子处理器正在作为协处理器集成到 HPC 生态系统中，其中将量子电路编译为硬件可执行形式决定了输出保真度和运行时间。当前的编译器使用固定的传递序列，并忽略最佳传递选择随电路、硬件和噪声条件而变化的事实。我们提出了 TuniQ，一个基于强化学习的系统，它在每个管道阶段选择编译通道，适应电路、后端和当前噪声配置文件。 TuniQ 引入了几个新颖的设计组件，例如用于阶段感知表示的双编码器、用于跨阶段信用分配的形状奖励以及用于有效编译的动态操作屏蔽。通过对多个 IBM Quantum Cloud 处理器上的不同量子工作负载进行评估，TuniQ 与最先进的 IBM Qiskit 转译器相比，提高了保真度并缩短了编译时间，无需重新训练即可在后端进行泛化，并能够以越来越大的优势强大地扩展到公用事业规模的电路。

title: Correlations Between Quantum Battery Capacity and Quantum Resources for Two-qubit System
abstract: We investigate the relationship between quantum battery capacity and quantum resources in a two-qubit system consisting of mutually coupled battery and charger subsystems. We find that the battery capacity decreases monotonically with the quantum entanglement, steering, Bell nonlocality and coherence, and peaks when these four quantum resources vanish. Moreover, we reveal the capacity gap between the total system capacity and the sum of the battery and charger spin capacities, which is the residual battery capacity, and establish its positive correlation with entanglement. Furthermore, unlike the first four resources, although the battery capacity decreases monotonically with quantum imaginarity, its disappearance under system detuning does not guarantee a peak capacity, and this effect becomes more pronounced as the detuning increases. In contrast to the first five resources, the quantum state texture shows a positive correlation with battery capacity, but a negative correlation with entanglement, steering, Bell nonlocality, coherence, imaginarity, and residual battery capacity. These monotonic relationships are independent of the choice of system parameters. Our findings reveal the relationship between quantum battery capacity and quantum resources during the dynamic evolution of a quantum battery system, and advances the theory of quantum batteries and the development of quantum energy storage systems.
summary:
我们研究了由相互耦合的电池和充电器子系统组成的双量子位系统中量子电池容量和量子资源之间的关系。我们发现电池容量随着量子纠缠、转向、贝尔非局域性和相干性单调减少，并在这四种量子资源消失时达到峰值。此外，我们揭示了系统总容量与电池和充电器旋转容量之和（即剩余电池容量）之间的容量差距，并建立了其与纠缠的正相关关系。此外，与前四种资源不同，虽然电池容量随着量子想象力单调减少，但在系统失谐下电池容量的消失并不能保证峰值容量，并且随着失谐的增加，这种效应变得更加明显。与前五种资源相比，量子态纹理与电池容量呈正相关，但与纠缠、转向、贝尔非局域性、相干性、想象性和剩余电池容量呈负相关。这些单调关系与系统参数的选择无关。

我们的研究结果揭示了量子电池系统动态演化过程中量子电池容量与量子资源之间的关系，并推进了量子电池理论和量子储能系统的发展。

title: String Diagrams for Quantum Foundations, Computing and Natural Language Processing
abstract: Applied category theory provides powerful mathematical tools for modelling processes and their composition. Symmetric monoidal categories, which involve series and parallel composition, are particularly well-suited for describing the composition of processes in space and time. Also called process theories, they admit string diagrams, which constitute a visually intuitive, mathematically rigorous, expressive and flexible syntax that is applicable to wide-ranging scientific domains. In this thesis, we employ string diagrams to investigate a selection of topics in the areas of quantum foundations, computing, and natural language processing: (1) We formalise constructor theory as a process theory. In the context of quantum physics, we also demonstrate the conflict between constructor-theoretic principles of locality and composition. Moreover, we argue that if the principle of locality is rejected, categorical quantum mechanics (CQM) can be conceived as a constructor theory of quantum physics. (2) We develop a formalism for wave-based logic circuits with phase encoding. We motivate the formalism using the example of spin-wave circuits, and then demonstrate its utility in design, analysis and optimisation of Boolean logic circuits. (3) We investigate the elimination of inter-language grammatical bureaucracy in the distributional compositional circuits (DisCoCirc) framework. In particular, we develop a hybrid grammar for a restricted fragment of the Urdu language, and show that Urdu text endowed with this hybrid grammar maps surjectively to DisCoCirc text circuits. Furthermore, we show that for the same language fragment, Urdu and English text circuits become the same up to gate-level translation. The aforementioned work supports the view that a process-relational outlook in science is well-supported by applied category-theoretic tools, particularly string diagrams.
summary:
应用范畴论为过程及其组成建模提供了强大的数学工具。对称幺半群范畴涉及串联和并联组合，特别适合描述空间和时间过程的组合。也称为过程理论，它们承认弦图，它构成了一种视觉上直观、数学上严谨、富有表现力和灵活的语法，适用于广泛的科学领域。在本论文中，我们使用弦图来研究量子基础、计算和自然语言处理领域的一系列主题：（1）我们将构造函数理论形式化为过程理论。在量子物理学的背景下，我们还证明了局部性和组合的构造函数理论原理之间的冲突。此外，我们认为，如果拒绝局域性原理，分类量子力学（CQM）可以被视为量子物理学的构造理论。 (2) 我们开发了一种具有相位编码的基于波的逻辑电路的形式。

我们以自旋波电路为例来激发形式主义，然后证明其在布尔逻辑电路的设计、分析和优化中的实用性。 （3）我们研究了分布式组合电路（DisCoCirc）框架中消除语言间语法官僚主义的问题。特别是，我们为乌尔都语语言的受限片段开发了一种混合语法，并表明赋予这种混合语法的乌尔都语文本满射地映射到 DisCoCirc 文本电路。此外，我们表明，对于相同的语言片段，乌尔都语和英语文本电路在门级翻译上变得相同。上述工作支持这样一种观点，即科学中的过程关系观得到了应用范畴论工具（特别是弦图）的充分支持。

title: Breaking the scalability barrier via a vertical tunable coupler in 3D integrated transmon system
abstract: Scaling superconducting quantum processors beyond the constraints of monolithic planar architectures is essential for fault-tolerant quantum computation. Here we demonstrate a three-dimensional (3D) integrated superconducting quantum processor in which two qubit chips are vertically stacked on opposing sides of a carrier chip and galvanically connected via multilayer flip-chip bonding. Intrachip qubit coupling is mediated by planar tunable couplers, whereas interchip coupling is enabled by vertical tunable couplers embedded in the carrier chip. Randomized benchmarking reveals simultaneous single-qubit gate fidelities of 99.87 % with negligible crosstalk, and controlled-Z gates achieve an average fidelity of 97.5 % for both intrachip and interchip operations. We further demonstrate high-fidelity Bell-state preparation and coherent generation of a four-qubit $W$ state, confirming the architecture's capability for interchip entanglement distribution. These results establish vertical coupling as a promising pathway toward scalable quantum processors compatible with advanced quantum error-correcting codes.
summary: 将超导量子处理器扩展到单片平面架构之外对于容错量子计算至关重要。在这里，我们展示了一种三维（3D）集成超导量子处理器，其中两个量子位芯片垂直堆叠在载体芯片的相对两侧，并通过多层倒装芯片键合进行电流连接。芯片内量子位耦合由平面可调谐耦合器介导，而芯片间耦合则由嵌入载体芯片中的垂直可调谐耦合器实现。随机基准测试显示，同时单量子位门保真度为 99.87%，串扰可忽略不计，而受控 Z 门在芯片内和芯片间操作方面实现了 97.5% 的平均保真度。我们进一步演示了高保真贝尔态准备和四量子位 $W$ 态的相干生成，证实了该架构的芯片间纠缠分布能力。这些结果表明，垂直耦合是实现与先进量子纠错码兼容的可扩展量子处理器的一条有前途的途径。

title: Digital Annealer-Assisted Accuracy-First Quantum Circuit Transpilation with Integrated QUBO Mapping and Routing
abstract: In the Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) era, limited qubit counts and high gate error rates directly constrain circuit fidelity, making the minimization of CNOT gate counts crucial. While conventional compilers prioritize heuristic efficiency, there is a compelling need for "accuracy-first" transpilation that prioritizes gate reduction over compilation latency. We propose a framework leveraging the Digital Annealer (DA) via two complementary strategies: (1) Hybrid, which uses DA-driven global initial mapping combined with high-speed heuristic routing by Qiskit, and (2) Full DA, which solves mapping and routing as separate DA-assisted QUBO subproblems within an iterative workflow. Benchmarks demonstrate that our Hybrid approach achieves an average CNOT reduction of 13.7 % (up to 57.4 %) compared to Qiskit's highest optimization level, with the largest gains on structured circuits such as GHZ and ASP where the initial layout is decisive. The Full DA approach matches Hybrid on structured circuits and outperforms ISAAQ by 23.1 % on average (maximum 90.8 %), but degrades on circuits with random or concentrated connectivity - exposing a trade-off between QUBO size and solution quality when the entire circuit is encoded in a single annealing pass. Although these global optimizations incur higher computational overhead than pure heuristics, our results indicate that for high-precision workflows where gate noise is the primary bottleneck, DA-assisted global initial placement provides a practical "time-for-quality" trade-off for enhancing the utility of near-term quantum hardware.
summary:
在嘈杂的中尺度量子 (NISQ) 时代，有限的量子比特数和高门错误率直接限制了电路保真度，使得 CNOT 门数的最小化至关重要。虽然传统编译器优先考虑启发式效率，但迫切需要“准确性第一”的转译，即优先考虑减少门数而不是编译延迟。我们提出了一个通过两种互补策略利用数字退火器 (DA) 的框架：(1) 混合，它使用 DA 驱动的全局初始映射与 Qiskit 的高速启发式路由相结合；(2) 完整 DA，它在迭代工作流程中将映射和路由作为单独的 DA 辅助 QUBO 子问题来解决。基准测试表明，与 Qiskit 的最高优化水平相比，我们的混合方法的 CNOT 平均降低了 13.7%（高达 57.4%），并且在初始布局起决定性作用的 GHZ 和 ASP 等结构化电路上收益最大。

Full DA 方法在结构化电路上与 Hybrid 相匹配，平均优于 ISAAQ 23.1%（最高 90.8%），但在具有随机或集中连接的电路上性能下降 - 当整个电路在单次退火通道中进行编码时，暴露了 QUBO 尺寸和解决方案质量之间的权衡。尽管这些全局优化比纯启发式方法会产生更高的计算开销，但我们的结果表明，对于门噪声是主要瓶颈的高精度工作流程，DA 辅助的全局初始放置为增强近期量子硬件的实用性提供了实用的“时间与质量”权衡。

title: Classification of informative subsets in quantum encrypted cloning on qudits
abstract: Encrypted cloning offers a means of introducing redundancy into quantum storage while respecting the no-cloning theorem: an unknown state is encoded into multiple signal-noise pairs, and only authorized subsets can recover the original information. However, the leakage properties of unauthorized subsets particularly for higher-dimensional systems (qudits) have remained unexplored. In this work, we systematically classify the informative subsets of the storage register in the qudit encrypted-cloning protocol. We focus on unauthorized subsets of size $n$ that contain exactly one qudit from each signal-noise pair. We show that the presence or absence of information leakage is determined by the solution set of a system of congruences whose coefficients depend on the dimension $d$ and on the numbers of signal and noise qudits in the subset. The reduced state is completely uninformative if and only if the congruence system admits only the trivial solution; otherwise, it retains a residual dependence on the input state through specific generalized Pauli operators. Low-dimensional examples ($n=1,2,3$) are worked out explicitly, and the complete classification is expressed in terms of a greatest-common-divisor condition. Our results extend the parity-based classification known for qubits ($d=2$) to arbitrary finite dimensions, revealing a dimension-dependent boundary of confidentiality in encrypted cloning.
summary:
加密克隆提供了一种在量子存储中引入冗余的方法，同时遵守不可克隆定理：未知状态被编码成多个信号噪声对，只有授权的子集才能恢复原始信息。然而，未经授权的子集的泄漏特性，尤其是高维系统（qudits）的泄漏特性仍未得到探索。在这项工作中，我们系统地对 qdit 加密克隆协议中存储寄存器的信息子集进行分类。我们关注大小为 $n$ 的未经授权的子集，这些子集恰好包含每个信号噪声对中的一个 qudit。我们表明，信息泄漏的存在或不存在是由同余系统的解集决定的，该系统的系数取决于维度 $d$ 以及子集中信号和噪声量子的数量。当且仅当同余系统只承认平凡的解决方案时，简化状态是完全没有信息的；否则，它通过特定的广义泡利算子保留对输入状态的剩余依赖。

低维示例 ($n=1,2,3$) 被明确计算出来，并且完整的分类以最大公约数条件表示。我们的结果将量子位 ($d=2$) 已知的基于奇偶校验的分类扩展到任意有限维度，揭示了加密克隆中与维度相关的机密性边界。

title: Security of decoy-state quantum key distribution with correlated bit-and-basis encoders
abstract: Practical quantum key distribution (QKD) modulators inevitably introduce correlations, causing the state emitted in a given round to depend on the setting choices made in previous rounds. These correlations break the round-by-round independence structure on which many widely used security proof techniques rely, leaving a significant gap between available theoretical guarantees and the reality of practical implementations. In this work, we develop a finite-key security proof for decoy-state BB84 against general coherent attacks that rigorously incorporates correlations introduced by Alice's bit-and-basis encoder, while requiring only partial characterization of such correlations.
summary: 实用的量子密钥分发（QKD）调制器不可避免地会引入相关性，导致给定回合中发出的状态取决于前几轮中所做的设置选择。这些相关性打破了许多广泛使用的安全证明技术所依赖的逐轮独立结构，在可用的理论保证和实际实现的现实之间留下了巨大的差距。在这项工作中，我们为诱饵状态 BB84 开发了一种针对一般相干攻击的有限密钥安全证明，该攻击严格结合了 Alice 的位和基编码器引入的相关性，同时仅需要此类相关性的部分特征。

title: Pre-Asymptotic Trainability in Photonic Variational Circuits under Postselection
abstract: Barren plateaus in variational quantum circuits are commonly attributed to strong mixing dynamics that cause gradient variance to vanish exponentially with system size. Passive photonic circuits, central to linear optical quantum computing, challenge this picture: although their Hilbert space can be exponentially large, their dynamics are constrained to a Lie algebra whose dimension scales as the square of the number of modes. In photonic systems, postselection also plays a central role, with gradient concentration governed not by the Hilbert-space dimension but by how it reshapes the effective observable. Through exact statevector simulations, we compare allow-bunching evolution, collision-free filtering, and dual-rail postselection. In the allow-bunching and collision-free regimes, gradient variance remains consistent with polynomial rather than exponential decay over the tested system sizes. By contrast, dual-rail postselection induces exponential concentration beyond moderate system sizes, robustly across three initialization ensembles. These results indicate that photonic barren plateaus are governed by the interplay between passive linear-optical dynamics, postselection geometry, and task observables, offering practical guidance for designing near-term photonic variational architectures.
summary:
变分量子电路中的贫瘠平台通常归因于强烈的混合动力学，导致梯度方差随着系统尺寸呈指数级消失。作为线性光量子计算核心的无源光子电路对这一图景提出了挑战：尽管它们的希尔伯特空间可以呈指数级大，但它们的动力学受限于李代数，其维数与模式数量的平方成正比。在光子系统中，后选择也起着核心作用，梯度浓度不是由希尔伯特空间维度决定，而是由它如何重塑有效可观测值决定。通过精确的状态向量模拟，我们比较了允许聚束演化、无碰撞过滤和双轨后选择。在允许聚束和无碰撞的情况下，梯度方差与测试系统大小上的多项式而不是指数衰减保持一致。相比之下，双轨后选择会导致超出中等系统规模的指数集中，并且在三个初始化集合中稳健。

这些结果表明，光子贫瘠高原是由被动线性光学动力学、后选择几何和任务可观测值之间的相互作用控制的，为设计近期光子变分架构提供了实用指导。

title: Thermodynamic value of CHSH-induced side-information channels in a Szilard engine
abstract: We study the thermodynamic value of side-information channels induced by Bell-type correlations through a CHSH prediction task embedded into a Szilard-type feedback engine. A thermal two-level system supplies a uniformly random physical microstate $X$, and a trusted referee encoding together with a nonsignalling correlation resource induces a controller bit $G$ that acts as side information about $X$. We show that the maximal average feedback work satisfies $\langle W_{\max}\rangle \le k_B T \ln 2 , I(X:G)$, with equality achievable in the ideal quasistatic limit. For the CHSH embedding considered here, the induced channel $X \to G$ is binary symmetric with success probability $p_{\rm win}=1/2+S(P)/8$, where $S(P)$ is the CHSH value. The corresponding reversible feedback work is $k_B T \ln 2 ,[1-h_2(p_{\rm win})]$, yielding a strict ordering of the optimal classical, quantum, and nonsignalling cases. The result should be interpreted as a thermodynamic valuation of CHSH-induced side information available to the controller, not as evidence that Bell nonlocality itself is a source of free energy. The analysis assumes that the controller receives only the compressed bit $G$ and does not include the thermodynamic cost of implementing the referee, the correlation resource, or the auxiliary preprocessing. A full-cycle analysis including controller-memory reset gives non-positive net work, consistent with the second law.
summary:
我们通过嵌入 Szilard 型反馈引擎的 CHSH 预测任务来研究由 Bell 型相关性引起的辅助信息通道的热力学值。热两级系统提供均匀随机的物理微观状态 $X$，可信裁判编码与非信令相关资源一起产生控制器位 $G$，充当有关 $X$ 的辅助信息。我们证明最大平均反馈功满足 $\langle W_{\max}\rangle \le k_B T \ln 2 , I(X:G)$，在理想准静态极限下可以实现相等。对于这里考虑的 CHSH 嵌入，诱导通道 $X \to G$ 是二元对称的，成功概率为 $p_{\rm win}=1/2+S(P)/8$，其中 $S(P)$ 是 CHSH 值。相应的可逆反馈工作是 $k_B T \ln 2 ,[1-h_2(p_{\rm win})]$，产生最佳经典、量子和非信号情况的严格排序。结果应被解释为对控制器可用的 CHSH 引起的辅助信息的热力学评估，而不是作为贝尔非局域性本身是自由能来源的证据。

该分析假设控制器仅接收压缩位$G$，并且不包括实现裁判、相关资源或辅助预处理的热力学成本。包括控制器内存重置在内的全周期分析给出了非正网络功，与第二定律一致。

title: Benchmarking and Resource Analysis for Augmented-Lagrangian Quantum Hamiltonian Descent
abstract: Quantum Hamiltonian Descent (QHD) is a continuous optimization algorithm based on simulating a time-dependent quantum Hamiltonian whose potential energy encodes the objective function and whose kinetic energy promotes exploration through quantum interference and tunneling. While QHD is formulated for unconstrained optimization, many real-world optimization problems are constrained and highly nonconvex. In this paper, we benchmark AL-QHD, a hybrid framework that embeds QHD within the Augmented Lagrangian Method (ALM), thereby solving a sequence of unconstrained subproblems while using ALM to enforce constraints. We evaluate AL-QHD on standard nonconvex test functions and use iterative refinement to improve solution accuracy at fixed per-run qubit cost. We also perform a gate-based resource analysis on ACOPF-derived power system subproblems constructed from power-network data to estimate the quantum-computer scale required for practical applications. Resource estimates on Texas7k-derived ACOPF instances show steep hard-gate scaling, reaching $\sim 4.46 \times 10^7$ entangling gates in a NISQ-oriented model and $\sim 9.42 \times 10^8$ T gates in a fault-tolerant model at $\sim 5.3 \times 10^2$ active variables. These results suggest that AL-QHD is a useful framework for studying constrained nonconvex optimization with QHD, but that practical ACOPF-scale applications would likely require large-scale fault-tolerant quantum hardware.
summary:
量子哈密顿下降 (QHD) 是一种基于模拟与时间相关的量子哈密顿量的连续优化算法，其势能对目标函数进行编码，其动能通过量子干涉和隧道效应促进探索。虽然 QHD 是为无约束优化而制定的，但许多现实世界的优化问题都是受约束的且高度非凸的。在本文中，我们对 AL-QHD 进行了基准测试，这是一种混合框架，它将 QHD 嵌入到增强拉格朗日方法 (ALM) 中，从而在使用 ALM 强制约束的同时解决一系列无约束子问题。我们在标准非凸测试函数上评估 AL-QHD，并使用迭代细化以固定的每次运行量子位成本提高解决方案的准确性。我们还对由电力网络数据构建的 ACOPF 派生电力系统子问题进行基于门的资源分析，以估计实际应用所需的量子计算机规模。

对 Texas7k 派生的 ACOPF 实例的资源估计显示出陡峭的硬门扩展，在面向 NISQ 的模型中达到 $\sim 4.46 \times 10^7$ 纠缠门，在 $\sim 5.3 \times 10^2$ 活动变量的容错模型中达到 $\sim 9.42 \times 10^8$ T 门。这些结果表明 AL-QHD 是研究 QHD 约束非凸优化的有用框架，但实际的 ACOPF 规模应用可能需要大规模容错量子硬件。

title: Optimal State Preparation for Impulse Estimation in Gaussian Quantum Systems
abstract: We present an optimal control-based strategy to enhance the estimation of impulse-like disturbances in continuously monitored linear classical and quantum systems by exploiting non-equilibrium states. Using optimal estimation techniques for linear Gaussian systems to collect information from the temporal vicinity of the disturbance, we cast the minimization of disturbance estimation uncertainty as a nonlinear optimal control problem over time-dependent system parameters. The resulting method dynamically shapes the estimation covariances through parametric modulation, maximizing information gain at a known impulse time. This differs fundamentally from conventional squeezing protocols using periodic modulation that effectively degrade inference of impulse-like disturbances. Applied to nanomechanical resonators and levitated nanoparticles, optimal parametric driving reduces estimation variance by up to a factor of two relative to steady-state operation
summary: 我们提出了一种基于最优控制的策略，通过利用非平衡态来增强连续监测的线性经典和量子系统中类脉冲扰动的估计。使用线性高斯系统的最优估计技术从扰动的时间附近收集信息，我们将扰动估计不确定性的最小化转化为瞬态系统参数的非线性最优控制问题。由此产生的方法通过参数调制动态地塑造估计协方差，从而在已知脉冲时间最大化信息增益。这与使用周期性调制的传统压缩协议有根本不同，传统压缩协议有效地降低了脉冲类干扰的推理能力。应用于纳米机械谐振器和悬浮纳米粒子，最佳参数驱动可将估计方差相对于稳态操作减少多达两倍

title: A post-Newtonian Gravitational Collapse Model from Linearized Gravity
abstract: We introduce a general gravity-related collapse mechanism based on linearized gravity. Starting from the weak-field limit of general relativity, gravitoelectromagnetism suggests an effective coupling between the gravitoelectric potential and the mass density distribution. At the same time, it provides a similar relation for the gravitomagnetic vector potential and the mass current. Following a hybrid (classical-quantum) dynamics approach, these couplings lead to a master equation whose non-unitary part is determined by the underlying mass distribution and currents. When the gravitoelectric potential coupling is considered, the well-known Diósi-Penrose collapse model acting on positional degrees of freedom is recovered. However, upon including the gravitomagnetic vector potential, additional collapse mechanisms emerge for rotational degrees of freedom as well as for mixed mass-rotation contributions.
summary: 我们引入了一种基于线性重力的通用重力相关塌陷机制。从广义相对论的弱场极限出发，引力电磁学提出了引力势与质量密度分布之间的有效耦合。同时，它为磁引力矢量势和质量流提供了类似的关系。采用混合（经典量子）动力学方法，这些耦合产生一个主方程，其非单一部分由基础质量分布和电流决定。当考虑引力电势耦合时，著名的作用于位置自由度的 Diósi-Penrose 塌陷模型得以恢复。然而，在包含磁引力矢量势后，旋转自由度以及混合质量旋转贡献会出现额外的塌缩机制。

title: Simulation of Non-Hermitian Hamiltonians with Bivariate Quantum Signal Processing
abstract: We achieve query-optimal quantum simulations of non-Hermitian Hamiltonians $H_{\mathrm{eff}} = H_R + iH_I$, where $H_R$ is Hermitian and $H_I \succeq 0$, using a bivariate extension of quantum signal processing (QSP) with non-commuting signal operators. The algorithm encodes the interaction-picture Dyson series as a polynomial on the bitorus, implemented through a structured multivariable QSP (M-QSP) circuit. A constant-ratio condition guarantees scalar angle-finding for M-QSP circuits with arbitrary non-commuting signal operators. A degree-preserving sum-of-squares spectral factorization permits scalar complementary polynomials in two variables. Angles are deterministically calculated in a classical precomputation step, running in $\mathcal{O}(d_R \cdot d_I)$ classical operations. Operator norms $\alpha_R\,,\beta_I$ contribute additively with query complexity $\mathcal{O}((\alpha_R + \beta_I)T + \log(1/\varepsilon)/\log\log(1/\varepsilon))$ matching an information-theoretic lower bound in the separate-oracle model, where $H_R$ and $H_I$ are accessed through independent block encodings. The postselection success probability is $e^{-2\beta_I T}\|e^{-iH_{\mathrm{eff}}T}|\psi_0\rangle\|^2\cdot (1 - \mathcal{O}(\varepsilon))$, decomposing into a state-dependent factor $\|e^{-iH_{\mathrm{eff}}T}|\psi_0\rangle\|^2$ from the intrinsic barrier and an $e^{-2\beta_I T}$ overhead from polynomial block-encoding.
summary:
我们使用具有非交换信号算子的量子信号处理（QSP）的双变量扩展，实现了非厄米哈密顿量 $H_{\mathrm{eff}} = H_R + iH_I$ 的查询最优量子模拟，其中 $H_R$ 是厄米哈密顿量，$H_I \succeq 0$。该算法将交互图像戴森级数编码为 bitorus 上的多项式，通过结构化多变量 QSP (M-QSP) 电路实现。恒定比率条件保证了具有任意非交换信号算子的 M-QSP 电路的标量寻角​​。保度平方和谱分解允许两个变量中的标量互补多项式。角度是在经典预计算步骤中确定性计算的，以 $\mathcal{O}(d_R \cdot d_I)$ 经典运算运行。运算符范数 $\alpha_R\,,\beta_I$ 与查询复杂度 $\mathcal{O}((\alpha_R + \beta_I)T + \log(1/\varepsilon)/\log\log(1/\varepsilon))$ 相加，匹配分离预言模型中的信息论下界，其中 $H_R$ 和 $H_I$ 通过独立的块编码访问。

选择后成功概率为 $e^{-2\beta_I T}\|e^{-iH_{\mathrm{eff}}T}|\psi_0\rangle\|^2\cdot (1 - \mathcal{O}(\varepsilon))$，分解为状态相关因子 $\|e^{-iH_{\mathrm{eff}}T}|\psi_0\rangle\|^2$固有障碍和多项式块编码的 $e^{-2\beta_I T}$ 开销。
